```tsx
  },
];

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ║  PRIVACY WORKSPACE — Sidebar Navigation Groups          ║
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ═══ 1) الخصوصية — الرئيسية: نتائج امتثال المواقع لنظام PDPL ═══
   ═══ الدور: تشريعي — رصد مدى التزام 6,246 موقع سعودي بـ 8 بنود PDPL ═══ */
const privacyMainGroups: NavGroup[] = [
  {
    id: "privacy_overview",
    label: "نظرة عامة",
    labelEn: "Overview",
    icon: Home,
    items: [
      { label: "لوحة الامتثال", labelEn: "Compliance Dashboard", icon: ShieldCheck, path: "/privacy/dashboard" },
      { label: "لوحة المؤشرات التنفيذية", labelEn: "Executive Dashboard", icon: Gauge, path: "/privacy/executive" },
      { label: "راصد الذكي", labelEn: "Smart Rasid", icon: Bot, path: "/smart-rasid" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "privacy_compliance_status",
    label: "حالة امتثال المواقع",
    labelEn: "Sites Compliance Status",
    icon: Globe,
    items: [
      { label: "سجل المواقع", labelEn: "Sites Registry", icon: Globe, path: "/privacy/sites" },
      { label: "نتائج الفحص", labelEn: "Scan Results", icon: FileCheck, path: "/privacy/scans" },
      { label: "البنود الثمانية (PDPL)", labelEn: "8 PDPL Clauses", icon: ListOrdered, path: "/privacy/clauses" },
      { label: "تقييم الامتثال", labelEn: "Compliance Assessment", icon: FileCheck, path: "/privacy/assessment" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "privacy_analytics",
    label: "مؤشرات الامتثال",
    labelEn: "Compliance KPIs",
    icon: BarChart3,
    items: [
      { label: "اتجاهات الامتثال", labelEn: "Compliance Trends", icon: Activity, path: "/privacy/trends" },
      { label: "مقارنة القطاعات", labelEn: "Sector Comparison", icon: Layers, path: "/privacy/sector-comparison" },
      { label: "خطابات الامتثال", labelEn: "Compliance Letters", icon: Mail, path: "/privacy/letters" },
      { label: "تنبيهات تغيير السياسات", labelEn: "Policy Change Alerts", icon: Bell, path: "/privacy/alerts" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "privacy_data_rights",
    label: "حقوق أصحاب البيانات",
    labelEn: "Data Subject Rights",
    icon: UserCheck,
    items: [
      { label: "طلبات حقوق البيانات (DSAR)", labelEn: "DSAR Requests", icon: ScrollText, path: "/privacy/dsar" },
      { label: "إدارة الموافقات", labelEn: "Consent Management", icon: FileSignature, path: "/privacy/consent" },
      { label: "سجلات المعالجة (RoPA)", labelEn: "Processing Records", icon: Database, path: "/privacy/processing-records" },
      { label: "تقييم أثر الخصوصية (DPIA)", labelEn: "Privacy Impact Assessment", icon: Crosshair, path: "/privacy/dpia" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "privacy_reports",
    label: "التقارير والتوصيات",
    labelEn: "Reports & Recommendations",
    icon: FileBarChart,
    items: [
      { label: "التقارير", labelEn: "Reports", icon: BarChart3, path: "/reports" },
      { label: "الملخص التنفيذي", labelEn: "Executive Brief", icon: FileText, path: "/executive-brief" },
      { label: "تصدير البيانات", labelEn: "Export Data", icon: Download, path: "/export-data" },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "privacy_shared",
    label: "أدوات مشتركة",
    labelEn: "Shared Tools",
    icon: Briefcase,
    items: [
      { label: "لوحتي", labelEn: "My Dashboard", icon: LayoutDashboard, path: "/my-dashboard" },
      { label: "الأعضاء", labelEn: "Members", icon: Users, path: "/members" },
      { label: "الإشعارات", labelEn: "Notifications", icon: Bell, path: "/notifications" },
    ],
  },
];

/* ═══ 2) الخصوصية — التشغيل: أدوات الفحص والمراقبة ═══ */
const privacyOperationsGroups: NavGroup[] = [
  {
    id: "privacy_scan_tools",
    label: "أدوات فحص الامتثال",
    labelEn: "Compliance Scanning Tools",
    icon: ScanSearch,
    items: [
      { label: "فحص مباشر", labelEn: "Live Scan", icon: Radio, path: "/privacy/live-scan" },
      { label: "فحص جماعي", labelEn: "Batch Scan", icon: Database, path: "/privacy/batch-scan" },
      { label: "مراقبة تلقائية للمواقع", labelEn: "Automated Watchers", icon: Eye, path: "/privacy/watchers" },
      { label: "فحص التطبيقات", labelEn: "Mobile App Check", icon: Smartphone, path: "/privacy/mobile-apps" },
    ],
  },
];

/* ═══ SIDEBAR SECTIONS — Dynamic per workspace ═══ */

/* Leaks workspace sections — الدور التشريعي: رصد البيانات */
const leaksSidebarSections: SidebarSection[] = [
  {
    id: "main",
    label: "نتائج الرصد",
    labelEn: "Monitoring Results",
    icon: Home,
    groups: mainSectionGroups,
  },
  {
    id: "operations",
    label: "أدوات التشغيل",
    labelEn: "Operations Tools",
    icon: Briefcase,
    groups: operationsSectionGroups,
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    label: "الإدارة والتحكم",
    labelEn: "Admin & Control",
    icon: Settings,
    groups: adminSectionGroups,
  },
];

/* Privacy workspace sections — الدور التشريعي: رصد امتثال الخصوصية */
const privacySidebarSections: SidebarSection[] = [
  {
    id: "main",
    label: "نتائج الامتثال",
    labelEn: "Compliance Results",
    icon: Home,
    groups: privacyMainGroups,
  },
  {
    id: "operations",
    label: "أدوات الفحص",
    labelEn: "Scanning Tools",
    icon: Briefcase,
    groups: privacyOperationsGroups,
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    label: "الإدارة والتحكم",
    labelEn: "Admin & Control",
    icon: Settings,
    groups: adminSectionGroups,
  },
];

/* Default — backward compat */
const sidebarSections = leaksSidebarSections;

/* ═══ Backward compat: flat list for route lookup ═══ */
const leaksNavGroups: NavGroup[] = [
  ...mainSectionGroups,
  ...operationsSectionGroups,
  ...adminSectionGroups,
];

const privacyNavGroups: NavGroup[] = [
  ...privacyMainGroups,
  ...privacyOperationsGroups,
  ...adminSectionGroups,
];

/* ═══ CONTROL PANEL items — kept for backward compat ═══ */
const controlPanelItems: NavItem[] = [
  ...adminSectionGroups.flatMap((g) => g.items),
];

/* Build all items for route lookup */
const allNavItems = [
  { label: "الرئيسية", labelEn: "Home", icon: Home, path: "/" },
  ...leaksNavGroups.flatMap((g) => g.items),
  ...privacyNavGroups.flatMap((g) => g.items),
  ...controlPanelItems,
];

const roleLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  executive: "تنفيذي", manager: "مدير", analyst: "محلل", viewer: "مشاهد",
};

/* Route → Workspace mapping */
const leaksPaths = new Set(leaksNavGroups.flatMap((g) => g.items.map((i) => i.path)));
const privacyPaths = new Set(privacyNavGroups.flatMap((g) => g.items.map((i) => i.path)));


function getWorkspaceForRoute(path: string): WorkspaceId {
  if (path.startsWith("/privacy")) return "privacy";
  return (localStorage.getItem("rasid_workspace") as WorkspaceId) || "leaks";
}

export default function DashboardLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [location, setLocation] = useLocation();
  const prevLocationRef = useRef(location);

  const autoScrollPages = ["/smart-rasid", "/live-scan"];
  const enableAutoScroll = autoScrollPages.includes(location);
  const { containerRef: mainContentRef } = useAutoScroll<HTMLElement>({ enabled: enableAutoScroll, threshold: 200 });

  // ═══ SCROLL TO TOP on every page navigation ═══
  useEffect(() => {
    if (prevLocationRef.current !== location) {
      prevLocationRef.current = location;
    }
    // Always scroll to top on any location change
    const scrollReset = () => {
      if (mainContentRef.current) {
        mainContentRef.current.scrollTop = 0;
        mainContentRef.current.scrollLeft = 0;
      }
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, left: 0, behavior: "instant" as ScrollBehavior });
      document.documentElement.scrollTop = 0;
      document.body.scrollTop = 0;
    };
    scrollReset();
    requestAnimationFrame(scrollReset);
    const t1 = setTimeout(scrollReset, 50);
    const t2 = setTimeout(scrollReset, 150);
    const t3 = setTimeout(scrollReset, 300);
    return () => { clearTimeout(t1); clearTimeout(t2); clearTimeout(t3); };
  }, [location, mainContentRef]);

  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(false);
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [cinematicOpen, setCinematicOpen] = useState(false);
  const [userMenuOpen, setUserMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const { user, isAuthenticated, loading, logout, isAdmin, isRootAdmin, ndmoRole } = useNdmoAuth();
  const { theme, themeMode, toggleTheme, switchable, activeDesignStyle } = useTheme();

  const platformUserId = (user as any)?.userId ?? "";

  /* ═══ WORKSPACE STATE ═══ */
  const [activeWorkspace, setActiveWorkspace] = useState<WorkspaceId>(() => getWorkspaceForRoute(location));

  // Auto-detect workspace from route
  useEffect(() => {
    const detected = getWorkspaceForRoute(location);
    if (detected !== activeWorkspace) {
      setActiveWorkspace(detected);
      localStorage.setItem("rasid_workspace", detected);
    }
  }, [location]);

  const switchWorkspace = useCallback((ws: WorkspaceId) => {
    setActiveWorkspace(ws);
    localStorage.setItem("rasid_workspace", ws);
    setLocation(ws === "privacy" ? "/privacy/dashboard" : "/");
  }, [setLocation]);

  const ws = wsColors[activeWorkspace];
  const wsNavGroups = activeWorkspace === "privacy" ? privacyNavGroups : leaksNavGroups;
  const activeSidebarSections = activeWorkspace === "privacy" ? privacySidebarSections : leaksSidebarSections;

  const [expandedGroups, setExpandedGroups] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
  const [customSearchQuery, setCustomSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [sectionDropdownOpen, setSectionDropdownOpen] = useState(false);
  const sectionDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [sidebarSearchQuery, setSidebarSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const sidebarSearchRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  /* ═══ CONTROL PANEL MODE — replaces sidebar with control-hub pages ═══ */
  const [controlPanelMode, setControlPanelMode] = useState(false);

  // Close dropdown when clicking outside
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (sectionDropdownRef.current && !sectionDropdownRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        setSectionDropdownOpen(false);
      }
    };
    if (sectionDropdownOpen) {
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    }
  }, [sectionDropdownOpen]);

  /* ═══ ACTIVE SECTION STATE ═══ */
  const getActiveSectionForRoute = (path: string): SidebarSectionId => {
    for (const section of activeSidebarSections) {
      for (const group of section.groups) {
        if (group.items.some((item) => item.path === path)) {
          return section.id;
        }
      }
    }
    return "main";
  };
  const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState<SidebarSectionId>(() => getActiveSectionForRoute(location));
  const activeSectionData = activeSidebarSections.find((s) => s.id === activeSection) || activeSidebarSections[0];

  // Auto-sync activeSection when route changes (keeps sidebar consistent for Atlas/Privacy pages)
  useEffect(() => {
    const detectedSection = getActiveSectionForRoute(location);
    if (detectedSection !== activeSection) {
      setActiveSection(detectedSection);
    }
  }, [location, activeSidebarSections]);

  const allCurrentGroups = wsNavGroups;
  const activeGroupId = allCurrentGroups.find((g) => g.items.some((item) => item.path === location))?.id;

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeGroupId) {
      setExpandedGroups((prev) => {
        if (prev[activeGroupId]) return prev;
        return { ...prev, [activeGroupId]: true };
      });
    }
  }, [activeGroupId]);

  const currentPage = allNavItems.find((item) => item.path === location);

  const toggleGroup = (groupId: string) => {
    setExpandedGroups((prev) => ({ ...prev, [groupId]: !prev[groupId] }));
    playClick();
  };

  const handleNavClick = useCallback(() => {
    setMobileOpen(false);
  }, []);
  // Auto-close mobile sidebar and user menu on any route change
  useEffect(() => {
    setMobileOpen(false);
    setUserMenuOpen(false);
  }, [location]);

  const isItemVisible = (item: NavItem) => {
    if (item.rootAdminOnly && !isRootAdmin) return false;
    if (!item.requiresAuth) return true;
    if (!isAuthenticated) return false;
    if (item.minRole === "admin" && !isAdmin) return false;
    return true;
  };
  const isDark = theme === "dark";
  const logoSrc = isDark ? FULL_LOGO_FOR_DARK_BG : FULL_LOGO_FOR_LIGHT_BG;
  const { playClick, playHover } = useSoundEffects();

  // Dynamic theme accent colors based on active design style
  const ta = getThemeAccent(activeDesignStyle);
  const accent = isDark ? ta.accent : ta.accentLight;
  const accentBg = isDark ? ta.accentBg : ta.accentBgLight;
  const accentBorder = isDark ? ta.accentBorder : ta.accentBorderLight;
  const sidebarBorder = isDark ? ta.sidebarBorder : ta.sidebarBorderLight;
  const textPrimary = isDark ? ta.textPrimary : ta.textPrimaryLight;
  const textSecondary = isDark ? ta.textSecondary : ta.textSecondaryLight;

  /* ═══ CUSTOM PAGES ═══ */
  const {
    pages: customPages,
    createPage: createCustomPage,
    updatePage: updateCustomPage,
    deletePage: deleteCustomPage,
    isDeleting: isDeletingPage,
  } = useCustomPages(activeWorkspace);

  const customPageTypesCount = new Set(customPages.map((page) => page.pageType)).size;

  useEffect(() => {
    setCustomSearchQuery("");
  }, [activeWorkspace]);

  // Ctrl+K to focus sidebar search
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'k') {
        e.preventDefault();
        sidebarSearchRef.current?.focus();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, []);

  const handleCreatePage = async (pageType: "dashboard" | "table" | "report", title: string, config?: Record<string, any>): Promise<boolean> => {
    try {
      const result = await createCustomPage(pageType, title, config);
      if (!result) {
        toast.error("تعذر إنشاء الصفحة، حاول مرة أخرى");
        return false;
      }

      toast.success(`تم إنشاء "${title}" بنجاح`);
      playClick();
      setLocation(`/custom/${pageType}/${(result as any).id}`);
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      toast.error("فشل إنشاء الصفحة");
      return false;
    }
  };

  const handleDeletePage = async (id: number) => {
    const target = customPages.find((p) => p.id === id);
    const confirmed = window.confirm(`هل أنت متأكد من حذف الصفحة "${target?.title || ""}"؟`);
    if (!confirmed) return;

    try {
      const result = await deleteCustomPage(id);
      if (!(result as any)?.success) {
        toast.error("تعذر حذف الصفحة");
        return;
      }

      if (location.startsWith(`/custom/`) && location.endsWith(`/${id}`)) {
        setLocation("/");
      }
      toast.success("تم حذف الصفحة");
    } catch (e) {
      toast.error("فشل حذف الصفحة");
    }
  };

  const handleRenamePage = async (id: number, newTitle: string) => {
    try {
      await updateCustomPage(id, { title: newTitle });
      toast.success("تم تحديث الاسم");
    } catch (e) {
      toast.error("فشل تحديث الاسم");
    }
  };

  if (!loading && !isAuthenticated) {
    return <Redirect to="/login" />;
  }

  // switchWorkspace is defined above via useCallback — this is the inner handler for UI buttons
  const handleWorkspaceSwitch = (wsId: WorkspaceId) => {
    switchWorkspace(wsId);
    setExpandedGroups({});
    playClick();
  };

  /* ═══ Render nav item ═══ */
  const renderNavItem = (item: NavItem) => {
    if (!isItemVisible(item)) return null;
    // Filter by sidebar search
    if (sidebarSearchQuery.trim() && !item.label.includes(sidebarSearchQuery.trim())) return null;
    const isActive = location === item.path;
    const Icon = item.icon;
    return (
      <Link key={item.path} href={item.path} onClick={() => { handleNavClick(); playClick(); }}>
        <motion.div
          whileHover={{ x: -2 }}
          whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
          className={`
            sidebar-nav-item flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer
            group relative transition-colors duration-150
            ${isActive
              ? 'sidebar-nav-item-active border'
              : 'hover:bg-white/[0.03]'
            }
          `}
          style={isActive ? { backgroundColor: accentBg, borderColor: accentBorder, color: textPrimary } : { color: textSecondary }}
        >
          {isActive && (
            <motion.div
              layoutId="activeNav"
              className="absolute right-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[3px] h-5 rounded-l-full"
              style={{ backgroundColor: accent, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${accent}66` }}
            />
          )}
          <div className="sidebar-nav-icon">
            <Icon className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0" style={isActive ? { color: accent } : undefined} />
          </div>
          {!collapsed && (
            <span className="text-[13px] font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{item.label}</span>
          )}
          {!collapsed && item.rootAdminOnly && (
            <span className="text-[8px] px-1 py-0.5 rounded bg-amber-500/15 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 mr-auto">ROOT</span>
          )}
          {collapsed && (
            <div className="absolute right-14 backdrop-blur-xl text-xs py-1.5 px-3 rounded-md shadow-xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 pointer-events-none transition-opacity whitespace-nowrap z-50 border"
            style={{ backgroundColor: isDark ? ta.sidebarBg : ta.sidebarBgLight, color: textPrimary, borderColor: accentBorder }}>
              {item.label}
            </div>
          )}
        </motion.div>
      </Link>
    );
  };

  /* ═══ Render nav group ═══ */
  const renderNavGroup = (group: NavGroup) => {
    const visibleItems = group.items.filter(isItemVisible);
    if (visibleItems.length === 0) return null;
    const isExpanded = expandedGroups[group.id] || false;
    const isActive = group.items.some((item) => item.path === location);
    const GroupIcon = group.icon;

    return (
      <div key={group.id} className="mb-1">
        {!collapsed ? (
          <button
            onClick={() => toggleGroup(group.id)}
            className={`
              sidebar-group-header w-full flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap px-3 py-2 rounded-lg
              text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors duration-150
              ${isActive ? '' : ''}
            `}
            style={isActive ? { color: accent, backgroundColor: accentBg } : { color: textSecondary }}
          >
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <GroupIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span>{group.label}</span>
            </div>
            <ChevronDown className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 transition-transform duration-200 ${isExpanded ? "" : "-rotate-90"}`} />
          </button>
        ) : (
          <div className="sidebar-gradient-divider" />
        )}

        <AnimatePresence initial={false}>
          {(isExpanded || collapsed) && (
            <motion.div
              initial={collapsed ? false : { height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
              animate={{ height: "auto", opacity: 1 }}
              exit={collapsed ? undefined : { height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
              className="overflow-hidden"
            >
              <div className={`space-y-0.5 ${collapsed ? "" : "mt-1 mr-2"}`}>
                {visibleItems.map(renderNavItem)}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen lg:h-screen lg:overflow-hidden overflow-x-hidden bg-background" style={{ maxWidth: '100vw', overflowX: 'hidden' }}>
      {/* ═══ AURORA BACKGROUND ═══ */}
      {isDark && ta.aurora1 !== "none" && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-0">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[60%] h-[50%] opacity-25" style={{ background: ta.aurora1 }} />
          <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-[50%] h-[40%] opacity-20" style={{ background: ta.aurora2 }} />
          <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[80%] h-[60%] opacity-10" style={{ background: ta.aurora3 }} />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Mobile overlay */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {mobileOpen && (
          <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 lg:hidden"
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)} />
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>

      {/* ═══ SIDEBAR ═══ */}
      <aside
        className={`
          fixed lg:relative z-50 h-full transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out flex flex-col sidebar-aurora-bg overflow-hidden
          ${collapsed ? "w-[72px]" : "w-[270px]"}
          ${mobileOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0"}
          right-0 lg:right-auto bg-sidebar ${isDark ? 'backdrop-blur-2xl' : ''} border-l
        `}
      >
        {/* Edge glow line */}
        <div className="sidebar-edge-glow" />
        {/* Floating orb */}
        <div className="sidebar-orb-2" />

        {/* Logo area */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-8 border-b" style={{ minHeight: collapsed ? '72px' : '200px', borderColor: sidebarBorder }}>
          <motion.div
            className="relative flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0"
            whileHover={{ scale: 1.04 }}
            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 200 }}
            style={{ width: collapsed ? '52px' : '100%', height: collapsed ? '52px' : '180px' }}
          >
            <div className="absolute rounded-full pointer-events-none" style={{
              width: collapsed ? '60px' : 'calc(100% + 16px)', height: collapsed ? '60px' : '190px',
              border: `1px solid ${accentBorder}`,
              animation: 'breathing-glow 4s ease-in-out infinite',
              boxShadow: isDark ? `0 0 30px ${ta.accentBg}, inset 0 0 30px ${ta.accentBg}` : `0 0 20px ${ta.accentBgLight}`,
            }} />
            <div className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none overflow-hidden">
              <div className="absolute w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full" style={{ top: '8%', right: '12%', opacity: isDark ? 0.5 : 0.25, animation: 'orbit 6s linear infinite', backgroundColor: accent }} />
              <div className="absolute w-1 h-1 rounded-full" style={{ bottom: '15%', left: '8%', opacity: isDark ? 0.4 : 0.2, animation: 'orbit 8s linear infinite reverse', backgroundColor: accent }} />
              <div className="absolute w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full" style={{ top: '50%', left: '3%', opacity: isDark ? 0.3 : 0.15, animation: 'orbit 10s linear infinite', backgroundColor: accent }} />
            </div>
            <img
              src={collapsed ? RASID_LOGO : logoSrc}
              alt="منصة راصد - مكتب إدارة البيانات الوطنية"
              className="relative z-10 object-contain"
              style={{
                width: collapsed ? '44px' : '100%', height: collapsed ? '44px' : '170px', maxWidth: '260px',
                filter: isDark ? `drop-shadow(0 0 15px ${ta.accentBg}) drop-shadow(0 0 40px ${ta.accentBg})` : `drop-shadow(0 0 8px ${ta.accentBgLight})`,
                animation: 'logo-float 5s ease-in-out infinite',
              }}
            />
          </motion.div>
        </div>

        {/* Data flow line */}
        <div className="data-flow-line mx-4 opacity-50" />

        {/* ═══ WORKSPACE SWITCHER — Toggle between Leaks & Privacy ═══ */}
        <div className="px-3 py-2 border-b" style={{ borderColor: sidebarBorder }}>
          <div className="flex gap-1" dir="rtl">
            <button
              onClick={() => { handleWorkspaceSwitch("leaks"); }}
              className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
                activeWorkspace === "leaks"
                  ? "bg-primary/15 text-primary border border-primary/25"
                  : "text-white/40 hover:text-white/60 hover:bg-white/5 border border-transparent"
              }`}
            >
              <Shield className="w-3 h-3" />
              {!collapsed && <span>الرصد</span>}
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => { handleWorkspaceSwitch("privacy"); }}
              className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
                activeWorkspace === "privacy"
                  ? "bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/25"
                  : "text-white/40 hover:text-white/60 hover:bg-white/5 border border-transparent"
              }`}
            >
              <Eye className="w-3 h-3" />
              {!collapsed && <span>الخصوصية</span>}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* ═══ SECTION SWITCHER — Premium Dropdown ═══ */}
        {!collapsed ? (
          <div className="relative px-3 py-2.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: sidebarBorder }} ref={sectionDropdownRef}>
            {/* Dropdown Trigger */}
            <motion.button
              onClick={() => { setSectionDropdownOpen(!sectionDropdownOpen); playClick(); }}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300 group"
              style={{
                backgroundColor: accentBg,
                color: accent,
                border: `1px solid ${accentBorder}`,
                boxShadow: isDark ? `0 2px 12px ${accentBg}` : `0 1px 6px ${accentBg}`,
              }}
              whileHover={{ scale: 1.01 }}
              whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
                <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center" style={{ backgroundColor: `${accent}20` }}>
                  <activeSectionData.icon className="w-4 h-4" />
                </div>
                <span>{activeSectionData.label}</span>
              </div>
              <motion.div
                animate={{ rotate: sectionDropdownOpen ? 180 : 0 }}
                transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] }}
              >
                <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 opacity-70" />
              </motion.div>
            </motion.button>

            {/* Dropdown Menu */}
            <AnimatePresence>
              {sectionDropdownOpen && (
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -8, scale: 0.96 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}
                  exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -8, scale: 0.96 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.25, ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] }}
                  className="absolute left-3 right-3 mt-2 rounded-xl overflow-hidden z-50"
                  style={{
                    backgroundColor: isDark ? 'rgba(15, 15, 25, 0.98)' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98)',
                    border: `1px solid ${sidebarBorder}`,
                    boxShadow: isDark
                      ? `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px ${accentBorder}, 0 4px 16px ${accentBg}`
                      : `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 0 0 1px ${sidebarBorder}`,
                    backdropFilter: isDark ? 'blur(20px)' : 'none',
                  }}
                >
                  <div className="p-1.5">
                    {activeSidebarSections.map((section, idx) => {
                      const isActive = activeSection === section.id;
                      const SIcon = section.icon;
                      return (
                        <motion.button
                          key={section.id}
                          onClick={() => {
                            setActiveSection(section.id);
                            setSectionDropdownOpen(false);
                            playClick();
                          }}
                          initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -12 }}
                          animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                          transition={{ duration: 0.2, delay: idx * 0.06 }}
                          className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-[13px] font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${isActive ? '' : 'hover:bg-white/[0.06]'}`}
                          style={isActive
                            ? { backgroundColor: accentBg, color: accent }
                            : { color: textSecondary }
                          }
                          whileHover={{ x: 4 }}
                          whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}
                        >
                          <div
                            className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-200"
                            style={isActive
                              ? { backgroundColor: `${accent}25`, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${accentBg}` }
                              : { backgroundColor: isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)' }
                            }
                          >
                            <SIcon className="w-4 h-4" />
                          </div>
                          <span>{section.label}</span>
                          {isActive && (
                            <motion.div
                              layoutId="section-indicator"
                              className="mr-auto w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full"
                              style={{ backgroundColor: accent }}
                              transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 500, damping: 30 }}
                            />
                          )}
                        </motion.button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </motion.div>
              )}
            </AnimatePresence>
          </div>
        ) : (
          /* Collapsed: show icon-only dropdown on hover */
          <div className="relative flex flex-col items-center border-b py-2" style={{ borderColor: sidebarBorder }} ref={sectionDropdownRef}>
            <motion.button
              onClick={() => { setSectionDropdownOpen(!sectionDropdownOpen); playClick(); }}
              className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl transition-all duration-200"
              style={{
                backgroundColor: accentBg,
                color: accent,
                border: `1px solid ${accentBorder}`,
                boxShadow: isDark ? `0 2px 8px ${accentBg}` : `0 1px 4px ${accentBg}`,
              }}
              whileHover={{ scale: 1.08 }}
              whileTap={{ scale: 0.92 }}
              title={activeSectionData.label}
            >
              <activeSectionData.icon className="w-4.5 h-4.5" />
            </motion.button>

            <AnimatePresence>
              {sectionDropdownOpen && (
                <motion.div
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -12, scale: 0.9 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0, scale: 1 }}
                  exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -12, scale: 0.9 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.25, ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] }}
                  className="absolute top-0 right-full mr-2 w-56 rounded-xl overflow-hidden z-50"
                  style={{
                    backgroundColor: isDark ? 'rgba(15, 15, 25, 0.98)' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98)',
                    border: `1px solid ${sidebarBorder}`,
                    boxShadow: isDark
                      ? `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px ${accentBorder}`
                      : `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 0 0 1px ${sidebarBorder}`,
                    backdropFilter: isDark ? 'blur(20px)' : 'none',
                  }}
                >
                  <div className="p-1.5">
                    {activeSidebarSections.map((section, idx) => {
                      const isActive = activeSection === section.id;
                      const SIcon = section.icon;
                      return (
                        <motion.button
                          key={section.id}
                          onClick={() => {
                            setActiveSection(section.id);
                            setSectionDropdownOpen(false);
                            playClick();
                          }}
                          initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -8 }}
                          animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                          transition={{ duration: 0.15, delay: idx * 0.05 }}
                          className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-[13px] font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${isActive ? '' : 'hover:bg-white/[0.06]'}`}
                          style={isActive
                            ? { backgroundColor: accentBg, color: accent }
                            : { color: textSecondary }
                          }
                          whileHover={{ x: 3 }}
                          whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}
                        >
                          <SIcon className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0" />
                          <span>{section.label}</span>
                        </motion.button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </motion.div>
              )}
            </AnimatePresence>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Quick Search */}
        {!collapsed && (
          <div className="px-3 py-2 sidebar-search">
            <div className="relative">
              <Search className="absolute right-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: textSecondary }} />
              <input
                ref={sidebarSearchRef}
                value={sidebarSearchQuery}
                onChange={(e) => setSidebarSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="بحث سريع... (Ctrl+K)"
                className="w-full rounded-xl text-[12px] py-2 pr-8 pl-3 border transition-all focus:outline-none focus:ring-2"
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(100,80,180,0.03)',
                  borderColor: isDark ? 'rgba(61,177,172,0.1)' : 'rgba(100,80,180,0.08)',
                  color: textPrimary,
                  fontFamily: "'Tajawal', sans-serif",
                  '--tw-ring-color': `${accent}33`,
                } as React.CSSProperties}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Navigation */}
        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-3 px-2 space-y-1 sidebar-nav-scroll" style={{ scrollbarWidth: 'thin', scrollbarColor: `${accentBorder} transparent` }}>
          <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
            {controlPanelMode ? (
              /* ═══ CONTROL PANEL MODE — لوحة التحكم الشاملة ═══ */
              <motion.div
                key="control-panel"
                initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                exit={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
                transition={{ duration: 0.35, ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] }}
              >
                {/* Premium Back Button */}
                {!collapsed && (
                  <motion.button
                    onClick={() => { setControlPanelMode(false); playClick(); }}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-3 mb-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden"
                    style={{
                      background: isDark
                        ? `linear-gradient(135deg, ${accent}15, ${accent}08)`
                        : `linear-gradient(135deg, ${accent}12, ${accent}06)`,
                      border: `1px solid ${accentBorder}`,
                      color: accent,
                      boxShadow: isDark ? `0 4px 20px ${accent}15, inset 0 1px 0 ${accent}20` : `0 2px 12px ${accent}10`,
                    }}
                    whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, x: 4 }}
                    whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}
                  >
                    <motion.div
                      className="absolute inset-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500"
                      style={{ background: `linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, ${accent}08, transparent)` }}
                      animate={{ x: ['-100%', '100%'] }}
                      transition={{ duration: 2, repeat: Infinity, ease: 'linear' }}
                    />
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center relative z-10" style={{ backgroundColor: `${accent}20`, boxShadow: `0 0 12px ${accent}20` }}>
                      <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4 group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-transform" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex flex-col items-start relative z-10">
                      <span>الرجوع للرئيسية</span>
                      <span className="text-[10px] opacity-60 font-normal">القائمة الرئيسية</span>
                    </div>
                    <Home className="w-4 h-4 mr-auto opacity-40 relative z-10" />
                  </motion.button>
                )}

                {/* Control Panel Title */}
                {!collapsed && (
                  <div className="px-3 mb-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                      <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center" style={{ backgroundColor: `${accent}20` }}>
                        <Settings className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: accent }} />
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: textPrimary }}>لوحة التحكم الشاملة</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="h-px" style={{ background: `linear-gradient(to left, transparent, ${accentBorder}, transparent)` }} />
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Control Panel Groups — reuse admin section groups */}
                {adminSectionGroups.map((group) => renderNavGroup(group))}
              </motion.div>
            ) : (
              /* ═══ NORMAL MODE — الأقسام الثلاثة ═══ */
              <motion.div
                key={activeSection}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 8 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -8 }}
                transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
              >
                {/* Render all groups for the active section */}
                {activeSectionData.groups.map((group) => renderNavGroup(group))}

                {/* Custom pages — show only in الرئيسية section */}
                {activeSection === "main" && isAuthenticated && (
                  <div className="mb-1">
                    {!collapsed ? (
                      <button
                        onClick={() => toggleGroup("custom_pages")}
                        className={`
                          sidebar-group-header w-full flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap px-3 py-2 rounded-lg
                          text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors duration-150
                        `}
                        style={{ color: textSecondary }}
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <FolderOpen className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                          <span>اللوحات المخصصة</span>
                          {!collapsed && customPages.length > 0 && (
                            <span
                              className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border"
                              style={{ backgroundColor: accentBg, borderColor: accentBorder, color: accent }}
                            >
                              {customPages.length}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        <ChevronDown className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 transition-transform duration-200 ${expandedGroups["custom_pages"] ? "" : "-rotate-90"}`} />
                      </button>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="sidebar-gradient-divider" />
                    )}
                    <AnimatePresence initial={false}>
                      {(expandedGroups["custom_pages"] || collapsed) && (
                        <motion.div
                          initial={collapsed ? false : { height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
                          animate={{ height: "auto", opacity: 1 }}
                          exit={collapsed ? undefined : { height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
                          transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
                          className="overflow-hidden"
                        >
                          <div className={`space-y-0.5 ${collapsed ? "" : "mt-1 mr-2"}`}>
                            {!collapsed && customPages.length > 0 && (
                              <div className="px-1 pb-1">
                                <div className="relative sidebar-search">
                                  <Search className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-3 h-3" style={{ color: textSecondary }} />
                                  <input
                                    value={customSearchQuery}
                                    onChange={(e) => setCustomSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                                    placeholder="ابحث داخل الصفحات المخصصة"
                                    className="w-full rounded-md text-[11px] py-1.5 pr-7 pl-2 border transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-1"
                                    style={{ backgroundColor: isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.02)', borderColor: sidebarBorder, color: textPrimary, '--tw-ring-color': accent } as React.CSSProperties}
                                  />
                                </div>
                                <p className="mt-1 text-[10px]" style={{ color: textSecondary }}>
                                  {customPages.length} صفحة • {customPageTypesCount} أنواع
                                </p>
                              </div>
                            )}
                            <CustomPagesList
                              pages={customPages}
                              collapsed={collapsed}
                              accent={accent}
                              accentBg={accentBg}
                              accentBorder={accentBorder}
                              searchQuery={customSearchQuery}
                              onDeletePage={handleDeletePage}
                              onRenamePage={handleRenamePage}
                              onNavClick={handleNavClick}
                              isDeleting={isDeletingPage}
                            />
                            <div className="mt-1 px-1">
                              <AddPageButton
                                collapsed={collapsed}
                                onCreatePage={handleCreatePage}
                                accent={accent}
                              />
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </motion.div>
                      )}
                    </AnimatePresence>
                  </div>
                )}
              </motion.div>
            )}
          </AnimatePresence>
        </nav>

        {/* User profile with dropdown menu */}
        <div className="sidebar-gradient-divider" />
        <div className="p-3 relative">
          {loading ? (
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-2">
                  <div className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" style={{ color: `${accent}80` }} />
            </div>
          ) : isAuthenticated && user ? (
            <>
              <button
                onClick={() => setUserMenuOpen(!userMenuOpen)}
                className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 ${collapsed ? "justify-center" : ""} rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 transition-all duration-300 sidebar-user-card`}
              >
                <div className="relative sidebar-avatar-ring">
                  <div className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0`}
                    style={{ backgroundColor: `${accent}1A`, border: `1.5px solid ${accent}33` }}>
                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold" style={{ color: accent }}>{user.name?.charAt(0) || "U"}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="sidebar-status-online" style={{ width: 6, height: 6, bottom: 0, right: 0 }} />
                </div>
                {!collapsed && (
                  <>
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 text-right">
                      <p className="text-[11px] font-medium truncate leading-tight" style={{ color: textPrimary }}>{user.name || "مستخدم"}</p>
                      <p className="text-[9px] truncate leading-tight" style={{ color: textSecondary }}>
                        {isRootAdmin ? "مدير النظام" : roleLabels[ndmoRole] || ndmoRole}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <ChevronDown className={`w-3 h-3 flex-shrink-0 transition-transform ${userMenuOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`} style={{ color: textSecondary }} />
                  </>
                )}
              </button>

              {/* User Dropdown Menu */}
              <AnimatePresence>
                {userMenuOpen && !collapsed && (
                  <motion.div
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8, scale: 0.95 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}
                    exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 8, scale: 0.95 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 0.15 }}
                    className="absolute bottom-full right-2 left-2 mb-1 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-2xl z-[60]"
                    style={{
                      background: isDark ? ta.sidebarBg : ta.sidebarBgLight,
                      border: `1px solid ${accentBorder}`,
                      backdropFilter: isDark ? "blur(20px)" : "none",
                    }}
                  >
                    {/* Profile */}
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        setUserMenuOpen(false);
                        setLocation("/profile");
                      }}
                      className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] transition-colors ${isDark ? "hover:bg-white/[0.06]" : "hover:bg-gray-50"}`}
                      style={{ color: textPrimary }}
                    >
                      <User className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: accent }} />
                      <span className="font-medium">الملف الشخصي</span>
                    </button>

                    <div className="h-px mx-2.5" style={{ backgroundColor: sidebarBorder }} />

                    {/* Control Panel */}
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        setControlPanelMode(true);
                        setUserMenuOpen(false);
                        setLocation("/control-hub");
                      }}
                      className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] transition-colors ${isDark ? "hover:bg-white/[0.06]" : "hover:bg-gray-50"}`}
                      style={{ color: textPrimary }}
                    >
                      <Settings className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: accent }} />
                      <span className="font-medium">لوحة التحكم</span>
                    </button>

                    <div className="h-px mx-2.5" style={{ backgroundColor: sidebarBorder }} />

                    {/* Logout */}
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        logout();
                        localStorage.removeItem("rasid_session");
                        toast("تم تسجيل الخروج");
                        window.location.href = "/login";
                      }}
                      className="w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] transition-colors text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10"
                    >
                      <LogOut className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      <span className="font-medium">تسجيل الخروج</span>
                    </button>
                  </motion.div>
                )}
              </AnimatePresence>
            </>
          ) : (
            <a href="/login">
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm"
                className={`gap-2 text-xs w-full ${collapsed ? "px-0 justify-center" : ""}`}
                style={{ borderColor: accentBorder, color: textPrimary }}>
                <LogIn className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                {!collapsed && "تسجيل الدخول"}
              </Button>
            </a>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Collapse toggle */}
        <div className="px-2 py-1 border-t hidden lg:block" style={{ borderColor: sidebarBorder }}>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm"
            className="w-full justify-center h-7"
            style={{ color: textSecondary }}
            onClick={() => setCollapsed(!collapsed)}>
            {collapsed ? <ChevronLeft className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile close */}
        <button className="absolute top-4 left-4 lg:hidden" style={{ color: textSecondary }}
          onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}>
          <X className="w-5 h-5" />
        </button>
      </aside>

      {/* ═══ MAIN CONTENT AREA ═══ */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto relative z-10 min-w-0" style={{ maxWidth: '100%' }}>
        {/* Top header with WORKSPACE SWITCHER */}
        <header
          className={`min-h-14 flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap gap-y-1 px-3 sm:px-4 lg:px-6 ${isDark ? 'backdrop-blur-xl' : ''} sticky top-0 z-30 transition-colors duration-300`}
          style={{
            backgroundColor: isDark ? ta.headerBg : ta.headerBgLight,
            borderBottom: `1px solid ${sidebarBorder}`,
          }}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <button className="lg:hidden text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}>
              <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>

            {/* Workspace indicator + quick switch */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <button
                onClick={() => switchWorkspace(activeWorkspace === "leaks" ? "privacy" : "leaks")}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02]"
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: `${ws.primary}14`,
                  borderColor: `${ws.primary}30`,
                }}
                title={`تبديل إلى ${activeWorkspace === "leaks" ? "امتثال الخصوصية" : "رصد البيانات"}`}
              >
                <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center" style={{ backgroundColor: `${ws.primary}20` }}>
                  {activeWorkspace === "privacy"
                    ? <Eye className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: ws.primary }} />
                    : <ShieldAlert className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: ws.primary }} />
                  }
                </div>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold hidden sm:inline" style={{ color: ws.primary }}>
                  {activeWorkspace === "privacy" ? "امتثال الخصوصية" : "رصد البيانات"}
                </span>
                <ArrowRightLeft className="w-3 h-3 hidden sm:block" style={{ color: `${ws.primary}80` }} />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 sm:gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
            {/* Live indicator */}
            <div className={`hidden sm:flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border`}
              style={{ backgroundColor: `${accent}0D`, borderColor: `${accent}26` }}>
              <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full animate-pulse-glow" style={{ backgroundColor: accent, boxShadow: `0 0 6px ${accent}80` }} />
              <span className="text-xs font-medium" style={{ color: accent }}>مباشر</span>
            </div>

            {/* Date */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs sm:text-[10px]" style={{ color: textSecondary }}>
              <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
              <span>{new Date().toLocaleDateString('ar-SA', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}</span>
            </div>

            {/* Theme Toggle */}
            {switchable && toggleTheme && (
              <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
                onClick={() => { toggleTheme(); playClick(); }}>
                {themeMode === "light" && <Sun className="w-4 h-4" />}
                {themeMode === "dark" && <Moon className="w-4 h-4" />}
                {themeMode === "auto" && <Monitor className="w-4 h-4" />}
              </Button>
            )}

            {/* Search */}
            <Link href="/smart-rasid">
              <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground" title="البحث الذكي">
                <Search className="w-4 h-4" />
              </Button>
            </Link>

            {/* Live Guide Button */}
            <GuideMenuButton />

            {/* Notifications */}
            <NotificationBell userId={user?.id} />

            {/* Export */}
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm"
              className="hidden lg:flex gap-1 text-xs" style={{ color: textSecondary }}>
              <FileDown className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span>تصدير</span>
            </Button>

            {/* Cinematic Mode */}
            <CinematicButton onClick={() => setCinematicOpen(true)} />
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Page content */}
        <main ref={mainContentRef} data-scroll-container className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden p-3 sm:p-4 lg:p-6 relative max-w-full min-w-0" style={{ WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch' }}>
          <ParticleField count={30} className="z-0" />
          <motion.div
            key={location}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: "easeOut" }}
            className="relative z-10 min-w-0 max-w-full"
          >
            {children}
          </motion.div>
        </main>
      </div>

      {/* Cinematic Mode */}
      <CinematicMode isOpen={cinematicOpen} onClose={() => setCinematicOpen(false)} pageTitle={currentPage?.label}>
        {children}
      </CinematicMode>

      {/* Rasid Character */}
      <RasidCharacterWidget />

      {/* Floating Toolbar — Platform Utilities */}
      <FloatingToolbar />

      {/* Live Guide Overlay */}
      <LiveGuideRenderer />
    </div>
  );
}

export { ROOT_ADMIN_USER_ID };

```

## `client/src/components/DashboardLayoutSkeleton.tsx`

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from './ui/skeleton';

/* ═══ Rasid Character CDN URL ═══ */
const RASID_CHARACTER_SMALL = "/branding/characters/Character_3_dark_bg_transparent.png";
const RASID_LOGO = "/branding/logos/Rased_3_transparent.png";

export function DashboardLayoutSkeleton() {
  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen bg-background relative overflow-hidden">
      {/* Full-screen loading overlay with character */}
      <div className="absolute inset-0 z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6"
        style={{
          background: "linear-gradient(135deg, hsl(var(--background)) 0%, #0a1230 30%, #101e45 60%, hsl(var(--card)) 100%)",
        }}
      >
        {/* Aurora background */}
        <div
          className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none"
          style={{
            background:
              "radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(61, 177, 172, 0.08), transparent 60%), " +
              "radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 80% 20%, rgba(100, 89, 167, 0.06), transparent 50%)",
          }}
        />

        {/* Dot grid */}
        <div
          className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none"
          style={{
            backgroundImage: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(61, 177, 172, 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px)",
            backgroundSize: "32px 32px",
          }}
        />

        {/* Rasid Character with breathing animation */}
        <div className="relative">
          {/* Glow ring behind character */}
          <div
            className="absolute -inset-8 rounded-full"
            style={{
              background: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(61, 177, 172, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%)",
              animation: "skeleton-glow 3s ease-in-out infinite",
            }}
          />
          {/* Orbiting dots around character */}
          <div className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full" style={{ animation: "orbit-spin 4s linear infinite" }}>
            <div className="absolute -top-2 left-1/2 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary"
              style={{ boxShadow: "0 0 8px rgba(61, 177, 172, 0.5)" }} />
          </div>
          <div className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full" style={{ animation: "orbit-spin 4s linear infinite reverse" }}>
            <div className="absolute -bottom-2 left-1/2 w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#6459A7]"
              style={{ boxShadow: "0 0 8px rgba(100, 89, 167, 0.5)" }} />
          </div>

          <img
            src={RASID_CHARACTER_SMALL}
            alt="راصد"
            className="w-28 h-28 object-contain character-breathe relative z-10"
            style={{ filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(61, 177, 172, 0.2))" }}
          />
        </div>

        {/* Logo */}
        <img
          src={RASID_LOGO}
          alt="راصد"
          className="h-8 object-contain opacity-80"
          style={{ filter: "drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(61, 177, 172, 0.15))" }}
        />

        {/* Loading text */}
        <div className="text-center space-y-2">
          <p className="text-sm font-semibold" style={{ color: "#E1DEF5" }}>
            جاري تحميل المنصة...
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs" style={{ color: "rgba(225, 222, 245, 0.4)" }}>
            يتم تجهيز لوحة مؤشرات الرصد
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Animated loading bar */}
        <div className="w-48 h-1 rounded-full overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.1)" }}>
          <div
            className="h-full rounded-full"
            style={{
              background: "linear-gradient(90deg, hsl(var(--primary)), #6459A7, hsl(var(--primary)))",
              backgroundSize: "200% 100%",
              animation: "loading-bar 1.5s ease-in-out infinite",
            }}
          />
        </div>

        {/* Skeleton preview behind (subtle) */}
        <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none">
          <div className="flex min-h-screen">
            <div className="w-[280px] border-r border-white/5 p-4 space-y-6">
              <Skeleton className="h-8 w-8 rounded-md" />
              <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full rounded-lg" />
              <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full rounded-lg" />
            </div>
            <div className="flex-1 p-4 space-y-4">
              <Skeleton className="h-12 w-48 rounded-lg" />
              <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-3">
                <Skeleton className="h-32 rounded-xl" />
                <Skeleton className="h-32 rounded-xl" />
                <Skeleton className="h-32 rounded-xl" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Keyframes */}
      <style>{`
        @keyframes skeleton-glow {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); }
          50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1.1); }
        }
        @keyframes orbit-spin {
          from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
          to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        @keyframes loading-bar {
          0% { width: 0%; background-position: 0% 0%; }
          50% { width: 70%; background-position: 100% 0%; }
          100% { width: 100%; background-position: 200% 0%; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}
```
