## `client/src/components/DeepDrillDown.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * DeepDrillDown — Multi-level drill-down system
 * Every element is clickable and opens deeper details
 * Supports unlimited nesting levels with breadcrumb navigation
 */
import React, { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
import { createPortal } from "react-dom";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  X, ArrowRight, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Eye, Shield, Database,
  ShieldAlert, Building2, Fingerprint, Radio, Activity, Bell, FileCheck,
  Send, Globe, FileText, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Target, Calendar,
  AlertTriangle, Zap, Brain, Sparkles, Clock, Gauge, CheckCircle2,
  XCircle, Lock, Heart, Landmark, GraduationCap, Plane, ShoppingCart,
  Factory, Briefcase, Wifi, Layers, MapPin, CreditCard, Phone, Mail,
  Hash, Server, ScanSearch, BarChart3, Users, Scale,
} from "lucide-react";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { useTheme } from "@/contexts/ThemeContext";
import LeakDetailDrilldown from "./LeakDetailDrilldown";

/* ═══ Types ═══ */
export interface DrillLevel {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  icon?: React.ReactNode;
  content: React.ReactNode;
}

/* ═══ Source helpers ═══ */
const sourceLabel = (s: string) => { switch (s) { case "telegram": return "تليجرام"; case "darkweb": return "دارك ويب"; default: return "موقع لصق"; } };
const sourceIcon = (s: string) => { switch (s) { case "telegram": return Send; case "darkweb": return Globe; default: return FileText; } };
const sourceColor = (s: string) => {
  switch (s) {
    case "telegram": return { text: "text-sky-500", bg: "bg-sky-500/10", fill: "#0ea5e9", glow: "rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.15)" };
    case "darkweb": return { text: "text-violet-500", bg: "bg-violet-500/10", fill: "#8b5cf6", glow: "rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15)" };
    default: return { text: "text-amber-500", bg: "bg-amber-500/10", fill: "#f59e0b", glow: "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15)" };
  }
};

const getSectorIcon = (sector: string) => {
  if (sector?.includes("حكوم")) return Building2;
  if (sector?.includes("صح") || sector?.includes("طب")) return Heart;
  if (sector?.includes("مصرف") || sector?.includes("بنوك") || sector?.includes("مالي")) return Landmark;
  if (sector?.includes("تعليم") || sector?.includes("جامع")) return GraduationCap;
  if (sector?.includes("اتصال") || sector?.includes("تقني")) return Wifi;
  if (sector?.includes("نقل") || sector?.includes("طيران")) return Plane;
  if (sector?.includes("تجار") || sector?.includes("تجزئ")) return ShoppingCart;
  if (sector?.includes("طاق") || sector?.includes("نفط")) return Factory;
  if (sector?.includes("توظيف") || sector?.includes("موارد")) return Briefcase;
  if (sector?.includes("تأمين")) return Shield;
  return Layers;
};

const piiTypeLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  "Phone": "رقم الهاتف", "Phone Number": "رقم الهاتف", "National ID": "رقم الهوية الوطنية",
  "Full Name": "الاسم الكامل", "Email": "البريد الإلكتروني", "Email Address": "البريد الإلكتروني",
  "Address": "العنوان", "IBAN": "رقم الآيبان", "Credit Card": "بطاقة ائتمان",
  "Passport Number": "رقم الجواز", "Date of Birth": "تاريخ الميلاد", "Password": "كلمة المرور",
  "IP Address": "عنوان IP", "Bank Account": "الحساب البنكي", "Medical Records": "السجلات الطبية",
  "Salary": "الراتب",
};
const getPiiLabel = (type: string) => piiTypeLabels[type] || type;

const getPiiIcon = (type: string) => {
  if (type.includes("Phone") || type.includes("Call")) return Phone;
  if (type.includes("ID") || type.includes("National") || type.includes("Passport")) return Fingerprint;
  if (type.includes("Email")) return Mail;
  if (type.includes("Credit") || type.includes("IBAN") || type.includes("Bank") || type.includes("Payment")) return CreditCard;
  if (type.includes("Address") || type.includes("GPS")) return MapPin;
  if (type.includes("Medical") || type.includes("Blood")) return Heart;
  if (type.includes("Password") || type.includes("Credential")) return Lock;
  if (type.includes("Salary") || type.includes("Employee") || type.includes("Job")) return Briefcase;
  if (type.includes("Student") || type.includes("GPA") || type.includes("Education")) return GraduationCap;
  return FileText;
};

const parseJsonSafe = (v: any, fallback: any = []) => {
  if (!v) return fallback;
  if (typeof v === 'string') {
    try { return JSON.parse(v) || fallback; } catch { return fallback; }
  }
  return v;
};

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MultiLevelDrillDown — Portal-based multi-level modal
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function MultiLevelDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  levels,
  maxWidth = "max-w-[95vw] sm:max-w-5xl",
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  levels: DrillLevel[];
  maxWidth?: string;
}) {
  const [currentIdx, setCurrentIdx] = useState(0);
  const { theme } = useTheme();
  const isDark = theme === "dark";

  const goBack = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentIdx > 0) setCurrentIdx(currentIdx - 1);
  }, [currentIdx]);

  const handleClose = useCallback(() => {
    setCurrentIdx(0);
    onClose();
  }, [onClose]);

  // Reset index when levels change
  React.useEffect(() => {
    setCurrentIdx(0);
  }, [levels.length]);

  if (!open || levels.length === 0) return null;

  const level = levels[Math.min(currentIdx, levels.length - 1)];

  const modalContent = (
    <AnimatePresence>
      <motion.div
        key="deep-drill-backdrop"
        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
        exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center justify-center p-2 sm:p-4"
        style={{
          position: 'fixed', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0,
          zIndex: 99998, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.65)',
          backdropFilter: document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "none" : "blur(6px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "none" : "blur(6px)",
        }}
        onClick={handleClose}
      >
        <motion.div
          key={`drill-level-${currentIdx}`}
          initial={{ scale: 0.95, x: currentIdx > 0 ? -30 : 0, opacity: 0 }}
          animate={{ scale: 1, x: 0, opacity: 1 }}
          exit={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0 }}
          transition={{ duration: 0.25, ease: "easeOut" }}
          className={`w-full ${maxWidth} max-h-[88vh] overflow-hidden bg-card border border-border rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col`}
          onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
        >
          {/* Header with breadcrumb */}
          <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border p-4 rounded-t-2xl">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
                {currentIdx > 0 && (
                  <motion.button
                    onClick={goBack}
                    className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors shrink-0"
                    whileHover={{ x: 3 }}
                    whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
                  >
                    <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                  </motion.button>
                )}
                {level.icon}
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <h3 className="text-foreground font-semibold text-sm truncate">{level.title}</h3>
                  {level.subtitle && <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground truncate">{level.subtitle}</p>}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
                {levels.length > 1 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    {levels.map((_, i) => (
                      <motion.div
                        key={i}
                        className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full transition-colors ${i === currentIdx ? 'bg-primary' : i < currentIdx ? 'bg-primary/40' : 'bg-muted-foreground/20'}`}
                        animate={i === currentIdx ? { scale: [1, 1.3, 1] } : {}}
                        transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
                      />
                    ))}
                    <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground mr-1">
                      {currentIdx + 1}/{levels.length}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
                <button onClick={handleClose} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors">
                  <X className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Breadcrumb trail */}
            {currentIdx > 0 && (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2 overflow-x-auto">
                {levels.slice(0, currentIdx + 1).map((l, i) => (
                  <React.Fragment key={l.id}>
                    {i > 0 && <ChevronLeft className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground/40 shrink-0" />}
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setCurrentIdx(i)}
                      className={`text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap transition-colors ${
                        i === currentIdx
                          ? 'bg-primary/10 text-primary font-medium'
                          : 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-accent'
                      }`}
                    >
                      {l.title}
                    </button>
                  </React.Fragment>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Content */}
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4">
            <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
              <motion.div
                key={`content-${currentIdx}`}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
                transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
              >
                {level.content}
              </motion.div>
            </AnimatePresence>
          </div>
        </motion.div>
      </motion.div>
    </AnimatePresence>
  );

  return createPortal(modalContent, document.body);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ClickableLeakCard — Leak item that opens LeakDetailDrilldown
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function ClickableLeakCard({ leak, index }: { leak: any; index?: number }) {
  const [showDetail, setShowDetail] = useState(false);
  const sc = sourceColor(leak.source);
  const SIcon = sourceIcon(leak.source);

  return (
    <>
      <motion.div
        onClick={() => setShowDetail(true)}
        whileHover={{ x: -3, scale: 1.01 }}
        initial={index !== undefined ? { opacity: 0, x: 20 } : undefined}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
        transition={index !== undefined ? { delay: index * 0.03 } : undefined}
        className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl bg-secondary/20 dark:bg-muted/40 border border-border/30 cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/20 dark:hover:border-primary/20 transition-all group"
      >
        <div className={`w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center ${sc.bg}`} style={{ boxShadow: `0 0 10px ${sc.glow}` }}>
          <SIcon className={`w-4 h-4 ${sc.text}`} />
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
          <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground truncate">{leak.titleAr || leak.title}</p>
          <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">{leak.sectorAr} · {(leak.recordCount || 0).toLocaleString()} (مكشوف)</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-1 shrink-0">
          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px]">{sourceLabel(leak.source)}</Badge>
          <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">
            {leak.detectedAt ? new Date(leak.detectedAt).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA", { month: "short", day: "numeric" }) : ""}
          </span>
        </div>
        <p className="text-[8px] text-primary/40 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity absolute bottom-1 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2">
          اضغط للتفاصيل ←
        </p>
      </motion.div>
      {showDetail && (
        <LeakDetailDrilldown
          leak={{ leakId: leak.leakId || leak.id }}
          open={true}
          onClose={() => setShowDetail(false)}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PaginatedLeakList — Paginated list of clickable leaks
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function PaginatedLeakList({ leaks, perPage = 8, emptyMessage = "لا توجد حالات رصد" }: { leaks: any[]; perPage?: number; emptyMessage?: string }) {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(leaks.length / perPage);
  const pageLeaks = leaks.slice(page * perPage, (page + 1) * perPage);

  if (leaks.length === 0) return <p className="text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm py-6">{emptyMessage}</p>;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{leaks.length} حالة رصد</p>
      {pageLeaks.map((l, i) => (
        <ClickableLeakCard key={l.leakId || l.id || i} leak={l} index={i} />
      ))}
      {totalPages > 1 && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 pt-2">
          <button onClick={() => setPage(Math.max(0, page - 1))} disabled={page === 0} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent disabled:opacity-30 transition-colors">
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{page + 1} / {totalPages}</span>
          <button onClick={() => setPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, page + 1))} disabled={page >= totalPages - 1} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent disabled:opacity-30 transition-colors">
            <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   StatusDrillDown — Drill-down for status cards
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function StatusDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  statusLabel,
  statusKey,
  leaks,
  allStats,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  statusLabel: string;
  statusKey: string;
  leaks: any[];
  allStats: any;
}) {
  const filteredLeaks = useMemo(() => {
    const statusMap: Record<string, string> = {
      "حالات رصد جديدة": "new",
      "قيد التحقق": "analyzing",
      "حالة رصد موثقة": "documented",
      "مغلق": "completed",
    };
    const status = statusMap[statusLabel] || statusKey;
    return leaks.filter(l => l.status === status);
  }, [leaks, statusLabel, statusKey]);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "status-overview",
      title: `تفاصيل: ${statusLabel}`,
      subtitle: `${filteredLeaks.length} حالة رصد`,
      icon: <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Summary stats */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            <div className="bg-secondary/30 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-border/30">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{filteredLeaks.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">عدد الحالات</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-secondary/30 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-border/30">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">
                {filteredLeaks.reduce((a, l) => a + (l.recordCount || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}
              </p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة للسجلات</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-secondary/30 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-border/30">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">
                {new Set(filteredLeaks.map(l => l.sectorAr)).size}
              </p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">قطاعات متأثرة</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Sector breakdown */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Building2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary" /> توزيع القطاعات
            </h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {Object.entries(
                filteredLeaks.reduce((acc: Record<string, number>, l) => {
                  const s = l.sectorAr || "غير محدد";
                  acc[s] = (acc[s] || 0) + 1;
                  return acc;
                }, {})
              ).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]).map(([sector, count]) => {
                const SIcon = getSectorIcon(sector);
                const pct = Math.round((count / filteredLeaks.length) * 100);
                return (
                  <div key={sector} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <SIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary shrink-0" />
                    <span className="text-xs text-foreground flex-1 truncate">{sector}</span>
                    <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-muted/30 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                      <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-primary/70" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground w-8 text-left">{count}</span>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Leak list */}
          <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground">قائمة الحالات</h4>
          <PaginatedLeakList leaks={filteredLeaks} />
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SectorDrillDown — Deep drill-down for a specific sector
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function SectorDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  sector,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  sector: { sector: string; count: number; records?: number };
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const sectorLeaks = useMemo(() => leaks.filter(l => l.sectorAr === sector.sector), [leaks, sector.sector]);
  const SIcon = getSectorIcon(sector.sector || "");

  // Group by source
  const bySource = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, any[]> = {};
    sectorLeaks.forEach(l => {
      const s = l.source || "unknown";
      if (!map[s]) map[s] = [];
      map[s].push(l);
    });
    return map;
  }, [sectorLeaks]);

  // Group by severity
  const bySeverity = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    sectorLeaks.forEach(l => {
      const s = l.severity || "medium";
      map[s] = (map[s] || 0) + 1;
    });
    return map;
  }, [sectorLeaks]);

  // PII types in this sector
  const piiInSector = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    sectorLeaks.forEach(l => {
      const pii = parseJsonSafe(l.piiTypes, []);
      pii.forEach((p: string) => { map[p] = (map[p] || 0) + 1; });
    });
    return Object.entries(map).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  }, [sectorLeaks]);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "sector-overview",
      title: `قطاع: ${sector.sector}`,
      subtitle: `${sector.count} حالة رصد · ${(sector.records ?? 0).toLocaleString()} سجل (مكشوف)`,
      icon: <SIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* KPI row */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
            <div className="bg-blue-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-blue-500/20">
              <ShieldAlert className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400 mx-auto mb-1" />
              <p className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">{sectorLeaks.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">حالات الرصد</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-emerald-500/20">
              <Database className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-400 mx-auto mb-1" />
              <p className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">{sectorLeaks.reduce((a, l) => a + (l.recordCount || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-red-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-red-500/20">
              <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400 mx-auto mb-1" />
              <p className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">{bySeverity["critical"] || 0}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">واسع النطاق</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-amber-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-amber-500/20">
              <Fingerprint className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400 mx-auto mb-1" />
              <p className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">{piiInSector.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">أنواع PII</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Severity breakdown */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">توزيع التأثير</h4>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-2">
              {[
                { key: "critical", label: "واسع النطاق", color: "text-red-400 bg-red-500/10" },
                { key: "high", label: "مرتفع", color: "text-amber-400 bg-amber-500/10" },
                { key: "medium", label: "متوسط", color: "text-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10" },
                { key: "low", label: "محدود", color: "text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/10" },
              ].map(s => (
                <div key={s.key} className={`p-3 rounded-lg ${s.color} text-center`}>
                  <p className="text-lg font-bold">{bySeverity[s.key] || 0}</p>
                  <p className="text-[9px]">{s.label}</p>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Source breakdown */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">توزيع المصادر</h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {Object.entries(bySource).map(([src, srcLeaks]) => {
                const sc = sourceColor(src);
                const SrcIcon = sourceIcon(src);
                return (
                  <div key={src} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-lg ${sc.bg} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                      <SrcIcon className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${sc.text}`} />
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-xs text-foreground flex-1">{sourceLabel(src)}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">{srcLeaks.length}</span>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* PII types in sector */}
          {piiInSector.length > 0 && (
            <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
              <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">أنواع البيانات الشخصية المكتشفة</h4>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {piiInSector.slice(0, 12).map(([type, count]) => (
                  <span key={type} className="text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 text-primary border border-primary/20">
                    {getPiiLabel(type)} ({count})
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Leak list */}
          <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground">جميع حالات الرصد في هذا القطاع</h4>
          <PaginatedLeakList leaks={sectorLeaks} />
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PiiTypeDrillDown — Deep drill-down for a specific PII type
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function PiiTypeDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  piiType,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  piiType: { type: string; count: number };
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const PIcon = getPiiIcon(piiType.type);
  const piiLeaks = useMemo(() =>
    leaks.filter(l => parseJsonSafe(l.piiTypes, []).includes(piiType.type)),
    [leaks, piiType.type]
  );

  // Sectors containing this PII
  const sectors = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    piiLeaks.forEach(l => {
      const s = l.sectorAr || "غير محدد";
      map[s] = (map[s] || 0) + 1;
    });
    return Object.entries(map).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  }, [piiLeaks]);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "pii-overview",
      title: `نوع البيانات: ${getPiiLabel(piiType.type)}`,
      subtitle: `${piiType.count} حالة رصد تحتوي على هذا النوع`,
      icon: <PIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            <div className="bg-amber-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-amber-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{piiLeaks.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">حالات الرصد</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-blue-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-blue-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{sectors.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">قطاعات متأثرة</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-red-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-red-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">
                {piiLeaks.reduce((a, l) => a + (l.recordCount || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}
              </p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Sectors breakdown */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">القطاعات المتأثرة</h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {sectors.map(([sector, count]) => {
                const SIcon = getSectorIcon(sector);
                const pct = Math.round((count / piiLeaks.length) * 100);
                return (
                  <div key={sector} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <SIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary shrink-0" />
                    <span className="text-xs text-foreground flex-1 truncate">{sector}</span>
                    <div className="w-20 h-1.5 bg-muted/30 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                      <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-amber-500/70" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground w-6 text-left">{count}</span>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground">حالات الرصد المرتبطة</h4>
          <PaginatedLeakList leaks={piiLeaks} />
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SourceDrillDown — Deep drill-down for a specific source
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function SourceDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  sourceKey,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  sourceKey: string;
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const sc = sourceColor(sourceKey);
  const SIcon = sourceIcon(sourceKey);
  const srcLeaks = useMemo(() => leaks.filter(l => l.source === sourceKey), [leaks, sourceKey]);

  // Sectors
  const sectors = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    srcLeaks.forEach(l => {
      const s = l.sectorAr || "غير محدد";
      map[s] = (map[s] || 0) + 1;
    });
    return Object.entries(map).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  }, [srcLeaks]);

  // Severity
  const bySeverity = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, number> = {};
    srcLeaks.forEach(l => { map[l.severity || "medium"] = (map[l.severity || "medium"] || 0) + 1; });
    return map;
  }, [srcLeaks]);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "source-overview",
      title: `مصدر: ${sourceLabel(sourceKey)}`,
      subtitle: `${srcLeaks.length} حالة رصد`,
      icon: <SIcon className={`w-5 h-5 ${sc.text}`} />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
            <div className={`${sc.bg} rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-border/30`}>
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{srcLeaks.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">حالات الرصد</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-emerald-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{srcLeaks.reduce((a, l) => a + (l.recordCount || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-red-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-red-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{bySeverity["critical"] || 0}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">واسع النطاق</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-violet-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-violet-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{sectors.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">قطاعات</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Sectors */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">القطاعات المتأثرة</h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {sectors.slice(0, 8).map(([sector, count]) => {
                const SecIcon = getSectorIcon(sector);
                return (
                  <div key={sector} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <SecIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary shrink-0" />
                    <span className="text-xs text-foreground flex-1 truncate">{sector}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">{count}</span>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground">جميع الحالات من هذا المصدر</h4>
          <PaginatedLeakList leaks={srcLeaks} />
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MonthDrillDown — Drill-down for a specific month
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function MonthDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  yearMonth,
  monthData,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  yearMonth: string;
  monthData: { count: number; records?: number };
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const monthLeaks = useMemo(() => {
    return leaks.filter(l => {
      if (!l.detectedAt) return false;
      const d = new Date(l.detectedAt);
      const ym = `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
      return ym === yearMonth;
    });
  }, [leaks, yearMonth]);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "month-overview",
      title: `شهر: ${yearMonth}`,
      subtitle: `${monthData.count} حالة رصد · ${(monthData.records ?? 0).toLocaleString()} سجل (مكشوف)`,
      icon: <Calendar className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            <div className="bg-blue-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-blue-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{monthLeaks.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">حالات الرصد</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-emerald-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{monthLeaks.reduce((a, l) => a + (l.recordCount || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-violet-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-violet-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{new Set(monthLeaks.map(l => l.sectorAr)).size}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">قطاعات</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Source breakdown */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">توزيع المصادر</h4>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
              {["telegram", "darkweb", "paste"].map(src => {
                const c = sourceColor(src);
                const I = sourceIcon(src);
                const cnt = monthLeaks.filter(l => l.source === src).length;
                return (
                  <div key={src} className={`${c.bg} rounded-lg p-3 text-center`}>
                    <I className={`w-4 h-4 ${c.text} mx-auto mb-1`} />
                    <p className="text-lg font-bold text-foreground">{cnt}</p>
                    <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">{sourceLabel(src)}</p>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground">حالات الرصد في هذا الشهر</h4>
          <PaginatedLeakList leaks={monthLeaks} />
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RiskDrillDown — Drill-down for risk score
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function RiskDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  riskScore,
  totalLeaks,
  newLeaks,
  totalRecords,
  sectorDistribution,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  riskScore: number;
  totalLeaks: number;
  newLeaks: number;
  totalRecords: number;
  sectorDistribution: any[];
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const getRiskColor = (s: number) => s >= 80 ? "#ef4444" : s >= 60 ? "#f59e0b" : s >= 40 ? "#3b82f6" : "#10b981";
  const getRiskLabel = (s: number) => s >= 80 ? "واسع النطاق" : s >= 60 ? "مرتفع" : s >= 40 ? "متوسط" : "منخفض";

  const criticalLeaks = useMemo(() => leaks.filter(l => l.severity === "critical" || l.severity === "high"), [leaks]);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "risk-overview",
      title: "تفاصيل مقياس المخاطر",
      subtitle: `مستوى المخاطر: ${getRiskLabel(riskScore)} (${riskScore}/100)`,
      icon: <Gauge className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color: getRiskColor(riskScore) }} />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Risk gauge */}
          <div className="flex justify-center">
            <div className="relative w-32 h-32">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" strokeWidth="8" />
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={getRiskColor(riskScore)} strokeWidth="8"
                  strokeLinecap="round" strokeDasharray={`${riskScore * 2.51} 251`} />
              </svg>
              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-3xl font-black text-foreground">{riskScore}</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: getRiskColor(riskScore) }}>{getRiskLabel(riskScore)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Risk factors */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-3">عوامل المخاطر</h4>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">حالات رصد جديدة / إجمالي</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">{newLeaks} / {totalLeaks}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">العدد المُدّعى</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">{totalRecords.toLocaleString()}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">حالات واسعة النطاق / مرتفعة</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold text-red-400">{criticalLeaks.length}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">قطاعات متأثرة</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">{sectorDistribution.length}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Critical leaks */}
          {criticalLeaks.length > 0 && (
            <>
              <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <AlertTriangle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> حالات الرصد الحرجة والمرتفعة
              </h4>
              <PaginatedLeakList leaks={criticalLeaks} perPage={5} />
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ComplianceDrillDown — Drill-down for compliance meter
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function ComplianceDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  compliancePercent,
  complianceItems,
  totalLeaks,
  newLeaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  compliancePercent: number;
  complianceItems: { label: string; compliant: boolean }[];
  totalLeaks: number;
  newLeaks: number;
}) {
  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "compliance-overview",
      title: "تفاصيل الامتثال PDPL",
      subtitle: `نسبة الامتثال: ${compliancePercent}%`,
      icon: <Shield className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-400" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Gauge */}
          <div className="flex justify-center">
            <div className="relative w-28 h-28">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" strokeWidth="8" />
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none"
                  stroke={compliancePercent >= 80 ? "#10b981" : compliancePercent >= 60 ? "#f59e0b" : "#ef4444"}
                  strokeWidth="8" strokeLinecap="round" strokeDasharray={`${compliancePercent * 2.51} 251`} />
              </svg>
              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-2xl font-black text-foreground">{compliancePercent}%</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Items detail */}
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {complianceItems.map((item, i) => (
              <div key={i} className={`p-4 rounded-xl border ${item.compliant ? 'bg-emerald-500/5 border-emerald-500/20' : 'bg-red-500/5 border-red-500/20'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {item.compliant ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-400" /> : <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400" />}
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{item.label}</p>
                    <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                      {item.compliant ? "متوافق مع متطلبات نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية" : "يحتاج إلى مراجعة وتحسين"}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-[10px] ${item.compliant ? 'border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400' : 'border-red-500/30 text-red-400'}`}>
                    {item.compliant ? "متوافق" : "غير متوافق"}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Summary */}
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground mb-2">ملخص</h4>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">
              نسبة الامتثال الحالية <strong className="text-foreground">{compliancePercent}%</strong> مع
              <strong className="text-emerald-400"> {complianceItems.filter(i => i.compliant).length}</strong> بنود متوافقة و
              <strong className="text-red-400"> {complianceItems.filter(i => !i.compliant).length}</strong> بنود تحتاج مراجعة.
              إجمالي حالات الرصد: <strong className="text-foreground">{totalLeaks}</strong>، منها <strong className="text-red-400">{newLeaks}</strong> جديدة.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ThreatDrillDown — Drill-down for top threats
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function ThreatDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  threat,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  threat: { title: string; count: number; records: number; severity: string };
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const threatLeaks = useMemo(() => leaks.filter(l => l.sectorAr === threat.title), [leaks, threat.title]);
  const SIcon = getSectorIcon(threat.title);

  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "threat-overview",
      title: `تهديد: ${threat.title}`,
      subtitle: `${threat.count} حالة رصد · خطورة: ${threat.severity === "critical" ? "حرجة" : threat.severity === "high" ? "مرتفعة" : "متوسطة"}`,
      icon: <Target className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            <div className="bg-red-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-red-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{threatLeaks.length}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">حالات الرصد</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-amber-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-amber-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{threatLeaks.reduce((a, l) => a + (l.recordCount || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-violet-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-violet-500/20">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{new Set(threatLeaks.map(l => l.source)).size}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">مصادر</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground">حالات الرصد المرتبطة</h4>
          <PaginatedLeakList leaks={threatLeaks} />
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   CountryDrillDown — Drill-down for a country on the heatmap
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function CountryDrillDown({
  open,
  onClose,
  country,
  countryStats,
  leaks,
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  country: { code: string; nameAr: string; nameEn: string };
  countryStats: { leakCount: number; recordCount: number };
  leaks: any[];
}) {
  const levels: DrillLevel[] = [
    {
      id: "country-overview",
      title: `${country.nameAr} (${country.code})`,
      subtitle: `${countryStats.leakCount} حالة رصد · ${countryStats.recordCount.toLocaleString()} سجل (مكشوف)`,
      icon: <Globe className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />,
      content: (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            <div className="bg-blue-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-blue-500/20">
              <Globe className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{countryStats.leakCount}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">حالات الرصد</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-500/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-center border border-emerald-500/20">
              <Database className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{countryStats.recordCount.toLocaleString()}</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">السجلات المكشوفة</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-secondary/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-border/30">
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">
              تم رصد <strong className="text-foreground">{countryStats.leakCount}</strong> حالة مرتبطة بـ <strong className="text-foreground">{country.nameAr}</strong> ({country.nameEn})
              بإجمالي <strong className="text-foreground">{countryStats.recordCount.toLocaleString()}</strong> سجل مدعى.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      ),
    },
  ];

  return <MultiLevelDrillDown open={open} onClose={onClose} levels={levels} />;
}
```

## `client/src/components/DetailModal.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * Shared DetailModal + DrillDown system
 * Uses React Portal to render outside any scrollable container
 * Supports multi-level drill-down navigation
 */
import React, { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { createPortal } from "react-dom";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import { X, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, ArrowRight, ChevronDown } from "lucide-react";

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DetailModal — Portal-based modal that always appears on top
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function DetailModal({
  open,
  onClose,
  title,
  icon,
  children,
  maxWidth = "max-w-3xl",
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  title: string;
  icon?: React.ReactNode;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  maxWidth?: string;
}) {
  if (!open) return null;

  const modalContent = (
    <AnimatePresence>
      <motion.div
        key="detail-modal-backdrop"
        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
        exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center justify-center p-4"
        style={{
          position: 'fixed', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0,
          zIndex: 99999, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
          backdropFilter: document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "none" : "blur(4px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "none" : "blur(4px)",
        }}
        onClick={onClose}
      >
        <motion.div
          initial={{ scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ scale: 1, y: 0 }}
          exit={{ scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
          className={`w-full ${maxWidth} max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto bg-card border border-border rounded-2xl shadow-2xl`}
          onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
        >
          <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border p-4 rounded-t-2xl flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {icon}
              <h3 className="text-foreground font-semibold text-base">{title}</h3>
            </div>
            <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors">
              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4">{children}</div>
        </motion.div>
      </motion.div>
    </AnimatePresence>
  );

  return createPortal(modalContent, document.body);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DrillDownModal — Multi-level drill-down navigation
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export interface DrillDownLevel {
  title: string;
  icon?: React.ReactNode;
  content: React.ReactNode;
}

export function DrillDownModal({
  open,
  onClose,
  levels,
  maxWidth = "max-w-4xl",
}: {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  levels: DrillDownLevel[];
  maxWidth?: string;
}) {
  const [currentLevel, setCurrentLevel] = useState(0);

  const goBack = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentLevel > 0) setCurrentLevel(currentLevel - 1);
  }, [currentLevel]);

  const handleClose = useCallback(() => {
    setCurrentLevel(0);
    onClose();
  }, [onClose]);

  if (!open || levels.length === 0) return null;

  const level = levels[Math.min(currentLevel, levels.length - 1)];

  const modalContent = (
    <AnimatePresence>
      <motion.div
        key="drilldown-backdrop"
        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
        exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center justify-center p-4"
        style={{
          position: 'fixed', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0,
          zIndex: 99999, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
          backdropFilter: document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "none" : "blur(4px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "none" : "blur(4px)",
        }}
        onClick={handleClose}
      >
        <motion.div
          key={`level-${currentLevel}`}
          initial={{ scale: 0.95, x: currentLevel > 0 ? -30 : 0, opacity: 0 }}
          animate={{ scale: 1, x: 0, opacity: 1 }}
          exit={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0 }}
          transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
          className={`w-full ${maxWidth} max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto bg-card border border-border rounded-2xl shadow-2xl`}
          onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
        >
          <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border p-4 rounded-t-2xl flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {currentLevel > 0 && (
                <button onClick={goBack} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors ml-1">
                  <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>
              )}
              {level.icon}
              <h3 className="text-foreground font-semibold text-base">{level.title}</h3>
              {levels.length > 1 && (
                <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground bg-accent/50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                  {currentLevel + 1} / {levels.length}
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
            <button onClick={handleClose} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors">
              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4">{level.content}</div>
        </motion.div>
      </motion.div>
    </AnimatePresence>
  );

  return createPortal(modalContent, document.body);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DrillDownProvider — Context for managing drill-down state
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
interface DrillDownContextType {
  pushLevel: (level: DrillDownLevel) => void;
  popLevel: () => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

const DrillDownContext = React.createContext<DrillDownContextType>({
  pushLevel: () => {},
  popLevel: () => {},
  reset: () => {},
});

export function useDrillDown() {
  return React.useContext(DrillDownContext);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DrillDownItem — Clickable item that opens drill-down details
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function DrillDownItem({
  children,
  className = "",
  onClick,
  hint = "اضغط لعرض التفاصيل",
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  onClick: () => void;
  hint?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <div
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`cursor-pointer group relative transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-[1.01] ${className}`}
      title={hint}
    >
      {children}
      <div className="absolute bottom-1 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
        <span className="text-[9px] text-primary/60 bg-card/80 backdrop-blur-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-border/50 whitespace-nowrap">
          {hint} ←
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DrillDownRow — Table row that opens drill-down on click
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function DrillDownRow({
  children,
  className = "",
  onClick,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  onClick: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <tr
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent/50 transition-colors ${className}`}
    >
      {children}
    </tr>
  );
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Stat Card that opens a modal
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function ClickableStatCard({
  icon,
  iconColor,
  bgColor,
  borderColor,
  value,
  label,
  onClick,
  trend,
  trendUp,
}: {
  icon: React.ReactNode;
  iconColor: string;
  bgColor: string;
  borderColor: string;
  value: string | number;
  label: string;
  onClick: () => void;
  trend?: string;
  trendUp?: boolean;
}) {
  return (
    <div
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`p-4 rounded-xl border ${borderColor} ${bgColor} cursor-pointer hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all group`}
    >
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
        <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-lg ${bgColor} flex items-center justify-center`}>
          {icon}
        </div>
        {trend && (
          <span className={`text-[10px] ${trendUp ? "text-red-400" : "text-emerald-400"}`}>
            {trend}
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
      <p className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">{typeof value === "number" ? value.toLocaleString() : value}</p>
      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{label}</p>
      <p className="text-[9px] text-primary/50 mt-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">اضغط للتفاصيل ←</p>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Paginated list for modals
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function PaginatedList({
  items,
  renderItem,
  emptyMessage = "لا توجد بيانات",
  perPage = 10,
}: {
  items: any[];
  renderItem: (item: any, index: number) => React.ReactNode;
  emptyMessage?: string;
  perPage?: number;
}) {
  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(0);
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(items.length / perPage);
  const pageItems = items.slice(page * perPage, (page + 1) * perPage);

  if (items.length === 0) return <p className="text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm py-8">{emptyMessage}</p>;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{items.length} عنصر</p>
      {pageItems.map((item, i) => renderItem(item, page * perPage + i))}
      {totalPages > 1 && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 pt-2">
          <button onClick={() => setPage(Math.max(0, page - 1))} disabled={page === 0} className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-accent disabled:opacity-30">
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{page + 1} / {totalPages}</span>
          <button onClick={() => setPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, page + 1))} disabled={page >= totalPages - 1} className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-accent disabled:opacity-30">
            <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```
