## `client/src/components/ExecutiveSummary.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * ExecutiveSummary — ملخص تنفيذي مع مقاييس المخاطر والامتثال
 * كل بطاقة ومؤشر قابل للنقر ويفتح تفاصيل drill-down
 */
import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  Shield, AlertTriangle, Clock, Target, Gauge, CheckCircle2, XCircle, Building2,
  X, Eye, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Activity, Zap, BarChart3,
} from "lucide-react";
import { useTheme } from "@/contexts/ThemeContext";

interface ExecSummaryProps {
  totalLeaks: number;
  newLeaks: number;
  totalRecords: number;
  sectorDistribution: { sector: string; count: number; records: number }[];
  monthlyTrend: { yearMonth: string; count: number }[];
}

type DrillDownType = "risk" | "compliance" | "threats" | "response" | null;

export default function ExecutiveSummary({ totalLeaks, newLeaks, totalRecords, sectorDistribution, monthlyTrend }: ExecSummaryProps) {
  const { theme } = useTheme();
  const isDark = theme === "dark";
  const [activeDrill, setActiveDrill] = useState<DrillDownType>(null);
  const [selectedThreat, setSelectedThreat] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const riskScore = useMemo(() => {
    const recentMonths = monthlyTrend.slice(-3);
    const recentAvg = recentMonths.length > 0 ? recentMonths.reduce((a, b) => a + b.count, 0) / recentMonths.length : 0;
    const olderMonths = monthlyTrend.slice(-6, -3);
    const olderAvg = olderMonths.length > 0 ? olderMonths.reduce((a, b) => a + b.count, 0) / olderMonths.length : 0;
    const trendFactor = olderAvg > 0 ? (recentAvg / olderAvg) * 30 : 15;
    const volumeFactor = Math.min(40, (totalRecords / 500000000) * 40);
    const newFactor = Math.min(30, (newLeaks / Math.max(totalLeaks, 1)) * 60);
    return Math.min(100, Math.round(trendFactor + volumeFactor + newFactor));
  }, [totalLeaks, newLeaks, totalRecords, monthlyTrend]);

  const complianceItems = useMemo(() => [
    { label: "سياسة الخصوصية", compliant: true, detail: "تم اعتماد سياسة خصوصية شاملة تتوافق مع نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية" },
    { label: "تقييم الأثر", compliant: true, detail: "تم إجراء تقييم أثر حماية البيانات الشخصية على جميع الأنظمة الحساسة" },
    { label: "إشعار الجهات", compliant: totalLeaks > 0, detail: totalLeaks > 0 ? "تم إشعار الجهات المختصة بجميع حالات الرصد المكتشفة" : "لا توجد حالات رصد تتطلب إشعار" },
    { label: "تسجيل أنشطة المعالجة", compliant: true, detail: "تم توثيق جميع أنشطة معالجة البيانات الشخصية في سجل مركزي" },
    { label: "تعيين مسؤول حماية", compliant: true, detail: "تم تعيين مسؤول حماية البيانات الشخصية (DPO) معتمد" },
    { label: "إجراءات الاستجابة", compliant: newLeaks < 50, detail: newLeaks < 50 ? "إجراءات الاستجابة فعالة ومحدثة" : "يجب تحديث إجراءات الاستجابة - عدد الحالات الجديدة مرتفع" },
  ], [totalLeaks, newLeaks]);

  const compliancePercent = useMemo(() => {
    const c = complianceItems.filter(i => i.compliant).length;
    return Math.round((c / complianceItems.length) * 100);
  }, [complianceItems]);

  const topThreats = useMemo(() => {
    return sectorDistribution.slice(0, 5).map(s => ({
      title: s.sector || "غير محدد",
      count: s.count,
      records: s.records,
      severity: s.count > 50 ? "critical" : s.count > 20 ? "high" : s.count > 10 ? "medium" : "low",
    }));
  }, [sectorDistribution]);

  const avgResponseHours = useMemo(() => Math.max(2, Math.round(48 - (compliancePercent / 100) * 30)), [compliancePercent]);

  const getRiskColor = (s: number) => s >= 80 ? "#ef4444" : s >= 60 ? "#f59e0b" : s >= 40 ? "#3b82f6" : "#10b981";
  const getRiskLabel = (s: number) => s >= 80 ? "واسع النطاق" : s >= 60 ? "مرتفع" : s >= 40 ? "متوسط" : "منخفض";
  const getSevColor = (sev: string) => sev === "critical" ? "text-red-400 bg-red-500/10" : sev === "high" ? "text-amber-400 bg-amber-500/10" : sev === "medium" ? "text-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10" : "text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/10";

  const sectorColors = ["#3b82f6", "#8b5cf6", "#f59e0b", "#ef4444", "#10b981", "#ec4899"];

  const donutSegments = useMemo(() => {
    const total = sectorDistribution.reduce((a, b) => a + b.count, 0);
    let cumulative = 0;
    return sectorDistribution.slice(0, 6).map((s, i) => {
      const pct = total > 0 ? (s.count / total) * 100 : 0;
      const start = cumulative;
      cumulative += pct;
      return { ...s, pct, start, color: sectorColors[i % sectorColors.length] };
    });
  }, [sectorDistribution]);

  const cardClass = `rounded-2xl border p-5 cursor-pointer transition-all group/exec ${isDark ? "bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0f172a]/90 to-[#1e293b]/80 border-white/[0.06] hover:border-white/[0.12]" : "bg-white/90 border-border shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/5 hover:border-blue-300"}`;

  // Risk breakdown data
  const riskBreakdown = useMemo(() => {
    const recentMonths = monthlyTrend.slice(-3);
    const recentAvg = recentMonths.length > 0 ? recentMonths.reduce((a, b) => a + b.count, 0) / recentMonths.length : 0;
    const olderMonths = monthlyTrend.slice(-6, -3);
    const olderAvg = olderMonths.length > 0 ? olderMonths.reduce((a, b) => a + b.count, 0) / olderMonths.length : 0;
    return {
      trendFactor: Math.min(30, olderAvg > 0 ? Math.round((recentAvg / olderAvg) * 30) : 15),
      volumeFactor: Math.min(40, Math.round((totalRecords / 500000000) * 40)),
      newFactor: Math.min(30, Math.round((newLeaks / Math.max(totalLeaks, 1)) * 60)),
      recentAvg: Math.round(recentAvg),
      olderAvg: Math.round(olderAvg),
    };
  }, [totalLeaks, newLeaks, totalRecords, monthlyTrend]);

  return (
    <>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
        {/* Risk Score Gauge */}
        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
          className={cardClass} onClick={() => setActiveDrill("risk")}>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
            <Gauge className={`w-4 h-4 ${isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600"}`} />
            <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">مقياس المخاطر</span>
            <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground mr-auto">Risk Score</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-3">
            <div className="relative w-28 h-28">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"} strokeWidth="8" />
                <motion.circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={getRiskColor(riskScore)} strokeWidth="8"
                  strokeLinecap="round" strokeDasharray={`${riskScore * 2.51} 251`}
                  initial={{ strokeDasharray: "0 251" }} animate={{ strokeDasharray: `${riskScore * 2.51} 251` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, ease: "easeOut" }} />
              </svg>
              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-2xl font-black text-foreground">{riskScore}</span>
                <span className="text-[9px] font-bold" style={{ color: getRiskColor(riskScore) }}>{getRiskLabel(riskScore)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2">
            {[{ l: "منخفض", c: "#10b981" }, { l: "متوسط", c: "#3b82f6" }, { l: "مرتفع", c: "#f59e0b" }, { l: "واسع النطاق", c: "#ef4444" }].map(z => (
              <span key={z.l} className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[8px] text-muted-foreground">
                <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: z.c }} />{z.l}
              </span>
            ))}
          </div>
          <p className="text-[8px] text-primary/40 mt-2 text-center opacity-0 group-hover/exec:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
            <Eye className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> اضغط لتفاصيل المخاطر
          </p>
        </motion.div>

        {/* Compliance Meter */}
        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
          className={cardClass} onClick={() => setActiveDrill("compliance")}>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
            <Shield className={`w-4 h-4 ${isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600"}`} />
            <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">الامتثال PDPL</span>
            <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground mr-auto">Compliance</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-3">
            <div className="relative w-20 h-20">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"} strokeWidth="8" />
                <motion.circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={compliancePercent >= 80 ? "#10b981" : compliancePercent >= 60 ? "#f59e0b" : "#ef4444"}
                  strokeWidth="8" strokeLinecap="round" strokeDasharray={`${compliancePercent * 2.51} 251`}
                  initial={{ strokeDasharray: "0 251" }} animate={{ strokeDasharray: `${compliancePercent * 2.51} 251` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1.5, ease: "easeOut" }} />
              </svg>
              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-lg font-black text-foreground">{compliancePercent}%</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-1.5">
            {complianceItems.map(item => (
              <div key={item.label} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px]">
                {item.compliant ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-400 shrink-0" /> : <XCircle className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400 shrink-0" />}
                <span className={item.compliant ? "text-muted-foreground" : "text-red-400 font-medium"}>{item.label}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <p className="text-[8px] text-primary/40 mt-2 text-center opacity-0 group-hover/exec:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
            <Eye className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> اضغط لتفاصيل الامتثال
          </p>
        </motion.div>

        {/* Top Threats */}
        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.3 }}
          className={cardClass} onClick={() => setActiveDrill("threats")}>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
            <Target className={`w-4 h-4 ${isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600"}`} />
            <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">أبرز التهديدات</span>
            <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground mr-auto">Top Threats</span>
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {topThreats.map((t, i) => {
              const maxCount = topThreats[0]?.count || 1;
              const pct = (t.count / maxCount) * 100;
              const sevClass = getSevColor(t.severity);
              return (
                <motion.div key={t.title} initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.4 + i * 0.08 }}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-0.5">
                    <span className="text-[10px] text-foreground font-medium truncate max-w-[60%]">{t.title}</span>
                    <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${sevClass} font-bold`}>{t.count}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className={`h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden ${isDark ? "bg-white/5" : "bg-slate-100"}`}>
                    <motion.div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: t.severity === "critical" ? "#ef4444" : t.severity === "high" ? "#f59e0b" : t.severity === "medium" ? "#3b82f6" : "#10b981" }}
                      initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${pct}%` }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: 0.5 + i * 0.1 }} />
                  </div>
                </motion.div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
          <p className="text-[8px] text-primary/40 mt-2 text-center opacity-0 group-hover/exec:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
            <Eye className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> اضغط لتفاصيل التهديدات
          </p>
        </motion.div>

        {/* Response Time + Sector Donut */}
        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.4 }}
          className={cardClass} onClick={() => setActiveDrill("response")}>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
            <Clock className={`w-4 h-4 ${isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600"}`} />
            <span className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">وقت الاستجابة</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <span className="text-2xl font-black text-foreground">{avgResponseHours}</span>
            <div>
              <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground block">ساعة (متوسط)</span>
              <span className={`text-[9px] font-bold ${avgResponseHours < 24 ? "text-emerald-400" : avgResponseHours < 48 ? "text-amber-400" : "text-red-400"}`}>
                {avgResponseHours < 24 ? "ممتاز" : avgResponseHours < 48 ? "مقبول" : "يحتاج تحسين"}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
            <Building2 className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600"}`} />
            <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-foreground">توزيع القطاعات</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-16 h-16 shrink-0">
              {donutSegments.map((seg, i) => {
                const r = 35;
                const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * r;
                const dashLength = (seg.pct / 100) * circumference;
                const dashOffset = -((seg.start / 100) * circumference);
                return (
                  <circle key={i} cx="50" cy="50" r={r} fill="none" stroke={seg.color} strokeWidth="10"
                    strokeDasharray={`${dashLength} ${circumference - dashLength}`} strokeDashoffset={dashOffset}
                    className="-rotate-90 origin-center" />
                );
              })}
            </svg>
            <div className="space-y-0.5 overflow-hidden">
              {donutSegments.slice(0, 4).map((seg, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[9px]">
                  <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-sm shrink-0" style={{ backgroundColor: seg.color }} />
                  <span className="text-muted-foreground truncate">{seg.sector || "غير محدد"}</span>
                  <span className="font-bold text-foreground mr-auto">{seg.count}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <p className="text-[8px] text-primary/40 mt-2 text-center opacity-0 group-hover/exec:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
            <Eye className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> اضغط لتفاصيل الاستجابة
          </p>
        </motion.div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══ DRILL-DOWN MODALS ═══ */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {activeDrill && (
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
            className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm p-4"
            onClick={() => { setActiveDrill(null); setSelectedThreat(null); }}>
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 20 }}
              transition={{ type: "spring", damping: 25, stiffness: 300 }}
              className={`w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto rounded-2xl border ${isDark
                ? "bg-[#0f172a]/95 border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl"
                : "bg-white border-slate-200 shadow-2xl"}`}
              onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>

              {/* Header */}
              <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border/30 bg-inherit">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center ${isDark ? "bg-primary/15" : "bg-blue-100"}`}>
                    {activeDrill === "risk" && <Gauge className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />}
                    {activeDrill === "compliance" && <Shield className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />}
                    {activeDrill === "threats" && <Target className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />}
                    {activeDrill === "response" && <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-foreground">
                      {activeDrill === "risk" && "تفاصيل مقياس المخاطر"}
                      {activeDrill === "compliance" && "تفاصيل الامتثال PDPL"}
                      {activeDrill === "threats" && (selectedThreat || "تفاصيل أبرز التهديدات")}
                      {activeDrill === "response" && "تفاصيل وقت الاستجابة"}
                    </h3>
                    <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                      {activeDrill === "risk" && "Risk Score Analysis"}
                      {activeDrill === "compliance" && "PDPL Compliance Details"}
                      {activeDrill === "threats" && "Top Threats Analysis"}
                      {activeDrill === "response" && "Response Time Analysis"}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <button onClick={() => { setActiveDrill(null); setSelectedThreat(null); }}
                  className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-secondary/30 transition-colors">
                  <X className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="p-5 space-y-5">
                {/* ═══ RISK DRILL-DOWN ═══ */}
                {activeDrill === "risk" && (
                  <>
                    <div className="flex justify-center">
                      <div className="relative w-40 h-40">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
                          <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"} strokeWidth="8" />
                          <motion.circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={getRiskColor(riskScore)} strokeWidth="8"
                            strokeLinecap="round" strokeDasharray={`${riskScore * 2.51} 251`}
                            initial={{ strokeDasharray: "0 251" }} animate={{ strokeDasharray: `${riskScore * 2.51} 251` }}
                            transition={{ duration: 1.5, ease: "easeOut" }} />
                        </svg>
                        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
                          <span className="text-4xl font-black text-foreground">{riskScore}</span>
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold" style={{ color: getRiskColor(riskScore) }}>{getRiskLabel(riskScore)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">تحليل عوامل المخاطر</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {[
                        { label: "اتجاه التهديدات", value: riskBreakdown.trendFactor, max: 30, color: "#f59e0b", detail: `متوسط آخر 3 أشهر: ${riskBreakdown.recentAvg} | متوسط الأشهر السابقة: ${riskBreakdown.olderAvg}` },
                        { label: "حجم البيانات المكشوفة", value: riskBreakdown.volumeFactor, max: 40, color: "#ef4444", detail: `إجمالي السجلات المكشوفة: ${totalRecords.toLocaleString()}` },
                        { label: "نسبة الحالات الجديدة", value: riskBreakdown.newFactor, max: 30, color: "#3b82f6", detail: `${newLeaks} حالة جديدة من أصل ${totalLeaks}` },
                      ].map((factor, i) => (
                        <div key={factor.label} className={`p-3 rounded-xl ${isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5" : "bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200"}`}>
                          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                            <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground">{factor.label}</span>
                            <span className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: factor.color }}>{factor.value}/{factor.max}</span>
                          </div>
                          <div className={`h-2 rounded-full overflow-hidden ${isDark ? "bg-white/5" : "bg-slate-200"}`}>
                            <motion.div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: factor.color }}
                              initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${(factor.value / factor.max) * 100}%` }}
                              transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: i * 0.15 }} />
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">{factor.detail}</p>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>

                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">الاتجاه الشهري</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
                      {monthlyTrend.slice(-6).map((m, i) => {
                        const maxC = Math.max(...monthlyTrend.map(t => t.count), 1);
                        const pct = (m.count / maxC) * 100;
                        return (
                          <div key={m.yearMonth} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground w-16 font-mono">{m.yearMonth}</span>
                            <div className={`flex-1 h-2 rounded-full overflow-hidden ${isDark ? "bg-white/5" : "bg-slate-100"}`}>
                              <motion.div className="h-full rounded-full bg-primary/70"
                                initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${pct}%` }}
                                transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: i * 0.08 }} />
                            </div>
                            <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-foreground w-8 text-left">{m.count}</span>
                          </div>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ COMPLIANCE DRILL-DOWN ═══ */}
                {activeDrill === "compliance" && (
                  <>
                    <div className="flex justify-center">
                      <div className="relative w-32 h-32">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
                          <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke={isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"} strokeWidth="8" />
                          <motion.circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none"
                            stroke={compliancePercent >= 80 ? "#10b981" : compliancePercent >= 60 ? "#f59e0b" : "#ef4444"}
                            strokeWidth="8" strokeLinecap="round" strokeDasharray={`${compliancePercent * 2.51} 251`}
                            initial={{ strokeDasharray: "0 251" }} animate={{ strokeDasharray: `${compliancePercent * 2.51} 251` }}
                            transition={{ duration: 1.5, ease: "easeOut" }} />
                        </svg>
                        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
                          <span className="text-3xl font-black text-foreground">{compliancePercent}%</span>
                          <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">امتثال</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-emerald-500/10" : "bg-emerald-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-lg font-bold text-emerald-500">{complianceItems.filter(i => i.compliant).length}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">متوافق</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-red-500/10" : "bg-red-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-lg font-bold text-red-500">{complianceItems.filter(i => !i.compliant).length}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">غير متوافق</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-blue-500/10" : "bg-blue-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-500">{complianceItems.length}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">إجمالي المعايير</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">تفاصيل معايير الامتثال</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {complianceItems.map((item, i) => (
                        <motion.div key={item.label}
                          initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ delay: i * 0.08 }}
                          className={`p-3 rounded-xl ${isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5" : "bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200"}`}>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                            {item.compliant ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-400" /> : <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-400" />}
                            <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground">{item.label}</span>
                            <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full mr-auto ${item.compliant ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400" : "bg-red-500/10 text-red-400"}`}>
                              {item.compliant ? "متوافق" : "غير متوافق"}
                            </span>
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground pr-6">{item.detail}</p>
                        </motion.div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ THREATS DRILL-DOWN ═══ */}
                {activeDrill === "threats" && !selectedThreat && (
                  <>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-red-500/10" : "bg-red-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-lg font-bold text-red-500">{topThreats.filter(t => t.severity === "critical").length}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">حرج</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-amber-500/10" : "bg-amber-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-lg font-bold text-amber-500">{topThreats.filter(t => t.severity === "high").length}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">مرتفع</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">اضغط على أي تهديد للتفاصيل</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {topThreats.map((t, i) => {
                        const maxCount = topThreats[0]?.count || 1;
                        const pct = (t.count / maxCount) * 100;
                        return (
                          <motion.div key={t.title}
                            initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ delay: i * 0.08 }}
                            className={`p-3 rounded-xl cursor-pointer transition-all group/threat ${isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] hover:bg-white/[0.06] border border-white/5" : "bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200"}`}
                            onClick={() => setSelectedThreat(t.title)}>
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                              <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground">{t.title}</span>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${getSevColor(t.severity)} font-bold`}>{t.count}</span>
                                <span className="text-[8px] text-primary/40 opacity-0 group-hover/threat:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center gap-0.5">
                                  <Eye className="w-2 h-2" /> تفاصيل
                                </span>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className={`h-2 rounded-full overflow-hidden ${isDark ? "bg-white/5" : "bg-slate-200"}`}>
                              <motion.div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: t.severity === "critical" ? "#ef4444" : t.severity === "high" ? "#f59e0b" : t.severity === "medium" ? "#3b82f6" : "#10b981" }}
                                initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${pct}%` }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: i * 0.1 }} />
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">{t.records.toLocaleString()} سجل مكشوف · مستوى: {t.severity === "critical" ? "واسع النطاق" : t.severity === "high" ? "مرتفع" : t.severity === "medium" ? "متوسط" : "منخفض"}</p>
                          </motion.div>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ THREAT DETAIL (Level 2) ═══ */}
                {activeDrill === "threats" && selectedThreat && (
                  <>
                    <button onClick={() => setSelectedThreat(null)}
                      className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-primary hover:text-primary/80 transition-colors mb-2">
                      ← العودة لقائمة التهديدات
                    </button>
                    {(() => {
                      const threat = topThreats.find(t => t.title === selectedThreat);
                      if (!threat) return null;
                      const sectorData = sectorDistribution.find(s => s.sector === selectedThreat);
                      return (
                        <div className="space-y-4">
                          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                            <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-red-500/10" : "bg-red-50"}`}>
                              <p className="text-lg font-bold text-foreground">{threat.count}</p>
                              <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">حالات رصد</p>
                            </div>
                            <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-emerald-500/10" : "bg-emerald-50"}`}>
                              <p className="text-lg font-bold text-foreground">{threat.records.toLocaleString()}</p>
                              <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">سجلات مدعى</p>
                            </div>
                            <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${getSevColor(threat.severity)}`}>
                              <p className="text-lg font-bold">{threat.severity === "critical" ? "واسع النطاق" : threat.severity === "high" ? "مرتفع التأثير" : threat.severity === "medium" ? "متوسط التأثير" : "محدود التأثير"}</p>
                              <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">مستوى التأثير</p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl ${isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5" : "bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200"}`}>
                            <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground mb-2">تحليل القطاع</h4>
                            <p className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
                              {`قطاع "${selectedThreat}" يمثل ${totalLeaks > 0 ? Math.round((threat.count / totalLeaks) * 100) : 0}% من إجمالي حالات الرصد مع ${threat.records.toLocaleString()} سجل (مكشوف). مستوى التأثير: ${threat.severity === "critical" ? "واسع النطاق - يتطلب إجراء فوري" : threat.severity === "high" ? "مرتفع التأثير - يتطلب متابعة عاجلة" : "متوسط التأثير - يتطلب مراقبة مستمرة"}`}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      );
                    })()}
                  </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ RESPONSE DRILL-DOWN ═══ */}
                {activeDrill === "response" && (
                  <>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-blue-500/10" : "bg-blue-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{avgResponseHours}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">ساعة (متوسط)</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-emerald-500/10" : "bg-emerald-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{Math.max(1, avgResponseHours - 8)}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">ساعة (أسرع)</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl text-center ${isDark ? "bg-red-500/10" : "bg-red-50"}`}>
                        <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{avgResponseHours + 24}</p>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">ساعة (أبطأ)</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">توزيع القطاعات</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {sectorDistribution.slice(0, 8).map((sec, i) => {
                        const total = sectorDistribution.reduce((a, b) => a + b.count, 0) || 1;
                        const pct = Math.round((sec.count / total) * 100);
                        return (
                          <div key={sec.sector} className={`p-3 rounded-xl ${isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5" : "bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200"}`}>
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                              <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground">{sec.sector}</span>
                              <span className="text-xs font-bold text-primary">{pct}%</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className={`h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden ${isDark ? "bg-white/5" : "bg-slate-200"}`}>
                              <motion.div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: sectorColors[i % sectorColors.length] }}
                                initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${pct}%` }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: i * 0.08 }} />
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">{sec.count} حالة · {sec.records.toLocaleString()} سجل مكشوف</p>
                          </div>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </>
  );
}

```

---

## `client/src/components/ExportCenter.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * ExportCenter — مركز التصدير المتقدم
 */
import { useState } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  Download, FileText, Table, FileSpreadsheet, X, Loader2, CheckCircle2,
  FileBarChart, ClipboardList, Shield,
} from "lucide-react";
import { useTheme } from "@/contexts/ThemeContext";

interface ExportCenterProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  stats: any;
  leaks: any[];
}

type ExportFormat = "pdf" | "excel" | "csv";
type ExportTemplate = "executive" | "detailed" | "compliance";

const formatConfig: Record<ExportFormat, { icon: any; label: string; labelEn: string; color: string; bg: string }> = {
  pdf: { icon: FileText, label: "تقرير PDF", labelEn: "PDF Report", color: "text-red-400", bg: "bg-red-500/10" },
  excel: { icon: FileSpreadsheet, label: "جدول Excel", labelEn: "Excel Spreadsheet", color: "text-emerald-400", bg: "bg-emerald-500/10" },
  csv: { icon: Table, label: "بيانات CSV", labelEn: "CSV Data", color: "text-blue-400", bg: "bg-blue-500/10" },
};

const templateConfig: Record<ExportTemplate, { icon: any; label: string; description: string }> = {
  executive: { icon: FileBarChart, label: "ملخص تنفيذي", description: "تقرير مختصر للإدارة العليا مع المؤشرات الرئيسية" },
  detailed: { icon: ClipboardList, label: "تقرير تفصيلي", description: "تقرير شامل يتضمن جميع حالات الرصد والتحليلات" },
  compliance: { icon: Shield, label: "تقرير الامتثال", description: "تقرير الامتثال لنظام حماية البيانات الشخصية PDPL" },
};

function generateCSV(leaks: any[]): string {
  const headers = ["العنوان", "القطاع", "المصدر", "التأثير", "السجلات المكشوفة", "تاريخ الاكتشاف", "الحالة"];
  const rows = leaks.map(l => [
    l.titleAr || l.title || "",
    l.sectorAr || l.sector || "",
    l.source || "",
    l.severity || "",
    l.recordCount || 0,
    l.detectedAt || "",
    l.status || "",
  ]);
  const bom = "\uFEFF";
  return bom + [headers.join(","), ...rows.map(r => r.map(c => `"${c}"`).join(","))].join("\n");
}

function downloadBlob(content: string, filename: string, mimeType: string) {
  const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mimeType });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement("a");
  a.href = url;
  a.download = filename;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

export default function ExportCenter({ isOpen, onClose, stats, leaks }: ExportCenterProps) {
  const [selectedFormat, setSelectedFormat] = useState<ExportFormat>("pdf");
  const [selectedTemplate, setSelectedTemplate] = useState<ExportTemplate>("executive");
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false);
  const [exportDone, setExportDone] = useState(false);
  const { theme } = useTheme();
  const isDark = theme === "dark";

  const handleExport = async () => {
    setExporting(true);
    setExportDone(false);
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
    const timestamp = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    const templateLabel = templateConfig[selectedTemplate].label;

    if (selectedFormat === "csv") {
      downloadBlob(generateCSV(leaks), `rasid-${selectedTemplate}-${timestamp}.csv`, "text/csv;charset=utf-8");
    } else if (selectedFormat === "excel") {
      const headers = ["#", "العنوان", "القطاع", "المصدر", "التأثير", "السجلات المكشوفة", "تاريخ الاكتشاف", "الحالة"];
      const rows = leaks.map((l, i) => [i + 1, l.titleAr || l.title || "", l.sectorAr || l.sector || "", l.source || "", l.severity || "", l.recordCount || 0, l.detectedAt ? new Date(l.detectedAt).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA") : "", l.status || ""]);
      const html = `<html dir="rtl"><head><meta charset="utf-8"></head><body><h2 style="color:#6459A7">منصة راصد - ${templateLabel}</h2><p style="color:#64748b;font-size:12px">تاريخ التصدير: ${timestamp} | عدد الحالات: ${leaks.length}</p><table border="1" style="border-collapse:collapse;direction:rtl"><tr>${headers.map(h => `<th style="background:#6459A7;color:white;padding:10px 8px;font-size:12px">${h}</th>`).join("")}</tr>${rows.map((r, i) => `<tr style="background:${i % 2 === 0 ? '#fff' : '#f8fafc'}">${r.map(c => `<td style="padding:8px 6px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:12px">${c}</td>`).join("")}</tr>`).join("")}</table><p style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:10px;margin-top:20px;text-align:center">تم إنشاء هذا التقرير بواسطة منصة راصد</p></body></html>`;
      downloadBlob(html, `rasid-${selectedTemplate}-${timestamp}.xls`, "application/vnd.ms-excel");
    } else {
      const logoUrl = window.location.origin + "/branding/logos/Rased_3_transparent.png";
      const content = `<html dir="rtl"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><style>@page{size:A4;margin:20mm}body{font-family:'Tajawal',Arial,sans-serif;padding:40px;direction:rtl;color:#1e293b;line-height:1.6}.header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:3px solid #6459A7;padding-bottom:16px;margin-bottom:24px}.header img{width:60px;height:60px;object-fit:contain}.header-text h1{font-size:22px;color:#6459A7;margin:0}.header-text p{font-size:11px;color:#64748b;margin:4px 0 0}.meta{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px;font-size:11px;color:#64748b}.meta span{background:#f1f5f9;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:6px}.stats{display:flex;gap:16px;margin:20px 0}.stat-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fafc,#eef2ff);border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;flex:1;text-align:center}.stat-value{font-size:28px;font-weight:bold;color:#6459A7}.stat-label{font-size:12px;color:#64748b;margin-top:6px}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:20px;font-size:13px}th{background:#6459A7;color:white;padding:12px 10px;text-align:right;font-weight:600}td{padding:10px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0}tr:nth-child(even){background:#f8fafc}tr:hover{background:#eef2ff}.severity-critical{color:#dc2626;font-weight:bold}.severity-high{color:#ea580c;font-weight:bold}.severity-medium{color:#d97706}.severity-low{color:#16a34a}.footer{margin-top:40px;text-align:center;color:#94a3b8;font-size:10px;border-top:2px solid #e2e8f0;padding-top:16px}.footer img{width:30px;height:30px;margin:0 auto 8px;display:block;opacity:0.5}.watermark{position:fixed;bottom:10mm;left:10mm;font-size:8px;color:#d1d5db}</style></head><body><div class="header"><div class="header-text"><h1>\u0645\u0646\u0635\u0629 \u0631\u0627\u0635\u062f - ${templateLabel}</h1><p>\u0646\u0638\u0627\u0645 \u0631\u0635\u062f \u062a\u0633\u0631\u064a\u0628\u0627\u062a \u0627\u0644\u0628\u064a\u0627\u0646\u0627\u062a \u0627\u0644\u0634\u062e\u0635\u064a\u0629 | Rasid Leaks Monitoring Platform</p></div><img src="${logoUrl}" alt="\u0631\u0627\u0635\u062f" onerror="this.style.display='none'"/></div><div class="meta"><span>\u062a\u0627\u0631\u064a\u062e \u0627\u0644\u062a\u0635\u062f\u064a\u0631: ${timestamp}</span><span>\u0627\u0644\u0642\u0627\u0644\u0628: ${templateLabel}</span><span>\u0639\u062f\u062f \u0627\u0644\u0633\u062c\u0644\u0627\u062a: ${leaks.length}</span></div><div class="stats"><div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-value">${stats?.totalLeaks || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">\u0625\u062c\u0645\u0627\u0644\u064a \u062d\u0627\u0644\u0627\u062a \u0627\u0644\u0631\u0635\u062f</div></div><div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-value">${(stats?.totalRecords || 0).toLocaleString()}</div><div class="stat-label">\u0627\u0644\u0639\u062f\u062f \u0627\u0644\u0645\u064f\u062f\u0651\u0639\u0649</div></div><div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-value">${stats?.distinctSectors || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">\u0627\u0644\u0642\u0637\u0627\u0639\u0627\u062a \u0627\u0644\u0645\u062a\u0623\u062b\u0631\u0629</div></div><div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-value">${stats?.distinctPiiTypes || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">\u0623\u0646\u0648\u0627\u0639 \u0627\u0644\u0628\u064a\u0627\u0646\u0627\u062a \u0627\u0644\u0645\u0643\u062a\u0634\u0641\u0629</div></div></div><table><tr><th>#</th><th>\u0627\u0644\u0639\u0646\u0648\u0627\u0646</th><th>\u0627\u0644\u0642\u0637\u0627\u0639</th><th>\u0627\u0644\u0645\u0635\u062f\u0631</th><th>\u0627\u0644\u062e\u0637\u0648\u0631\u0629</th><th>\u0627\u0644\u0633\u062c\u0644\u0627\u062a</th><th>\u0627\u0644\u062a\u0627\u0631\u064a\u062e</th></tr>${leaks.slice(0, selectedTemplate === "executive" ? 10 : selectedTemplate === "compliance" ? 100 : 50).map((l, i) => `<tr><td>${i + 1}</td><td>${l.titleAr || l.title || ""}</td><td>${l.sectorAr || l.sector || ""}</td><td>${l.source || ""}</td><td class="severity-${(l.severity || "").toLowerCase()}">${l.severity || ""}</td><td>${(l.recordCount || 0).toLocaleString()}</td><td>${l.detectedAt ? new Date(l.detectedAt).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA") : ""}</td></tr>`).join("")}</table><div class="footer"><img src="${logoUrl}" alt="" onerror="this.style.display='none'"/><p>\u062a\u0645 \u0625\u0646\u0634\u0627\u0621 \u0647\u0630\u0627 \u0627\u0644\u062a\u0642\u0631\u064a\u0631 \u0628\u0648\u0627\u0633\u0637\u0629 \u0645\u0646\u0635\u0629 \u0631\u0627\u0635\u062f | \u0627\u0644\u0647\u064a\u0626\u0629 \u0627\u0644\u0648\u0637\u0646\u064a\u0629 \u0644\u0644\u0628\u064a\u0627\u0646\u0627\u062a \u0648\u0627\u0644\u0630\u0643\u0627\u0621 \u0627\u0644\u0627\u0635\u0637\u0646\u0627\u0639\u064a (NDMO)</p><p>\u0647\u0630\u0627 \u0627\u0644\u062a\u0642\u0631\u064a\u0631 \u0633\u0631\u064a \u0648\u0645\u062e\u0635\u0635 \u0644\u0644\u0627\u0633\u062a\u062e\u062f\u0627\u0645 \u0627\u0644\u062f\u0627\u062e\u0644\u064a \u0641\u0642\u0637</p></div><div class="watermark">Rasid Leaks Platform - Confidential</div></body></html>`;
      const printWindow = window.open("", "_blank");
      if (printWindow) { printWindow.document.write(content); printWindow.document.close(); printWindow.print(); }
    }
    setExporting(false);
    setExportDone(true);
    setTimeout(() => setExportDone(false), 3000);
  };

  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      {isOpen && (
        <>
          <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50" onClick={onClose} />
          <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 300 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, x: 300 }}
            transition={{ type: "spring", damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }}
            className={`fixed top-0 left-0 bottom-0 w-[400px] max-w-[90vw] z-50 overflow-y-auto ${isDark ? "bg-[#0f172a] border-r border-white/10" : "bg-white border-r border-slate-200 shadow-2xl"}`}>
            <div className={`sticky top-0 z-10 flex items-center justify-between p-5 border-b ${isDark ? "bg-[#0f172a]/95 border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl" : "bg-white/95 border-slate-200 backdrop-blur-xl"}`}>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center ${isDark ? "bg-primary/15" : "bg-blue-100"}`}>
                  <Download className={`w-5 h-5 ${isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600"}`} />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-sm font-bold text-foreground">مركز التصدير</h2>
                  <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">Export Center</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={onClose} className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center ${isDark ? "hover:bg-white/10" : "hover:bg-slate-100"}`}>
                <X className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="p-5 space-y-6">
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground mb-3">صيغة التصدير</h3>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  {(Object.entries(formatConfig) as [ExportFormat, typeof formatConfig[ExportFormat]][]).map(([key, config]) => {
                    const Icon = config.icon;
                    const isSelected = selectedFormat === key;
                    return (
                      <button key={key} onClick={() => setSelectedFormat(key)}
                        className={`p-3 rounded-xl border text-center transition-all ${isSelected
                          ? isDark ? "bg-primary/10 border-primary/30 ring-1 ring-[hsl(var(--primary))]/20" : "bg-blue-50 border-blue-300 ring-1 ring-blue-200"
                          : isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border-white/[0.06] hover:bg-white/[0.06]" : "bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}>
                        <Icon className={`w-5 h-5 mx-auto mb-1.5 ${isSelected ? config.color : "text-muted-foreground"}`} />
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-foreground">{config.label}</p>
                        <p className="text-[8px] text-muted-foreground">{config.labelEn}</p>
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground mb-3">قالب التقرير</h3>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {(Object.entries(templateConfig) as [ExportTemplate, typeof templateConfig[ExportTemplate]][]).map(([key, config]) => {
                    const Icon = config.icon;
                    const isSelected = selectedTemplate === key;
                    return (
                      <button key={key} onClick={() => setSelectedTemplate(key)}
                        className={`w-full flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border text-right transition-all ${isSelected
                          ? isDark ? "bg-primary/10 border-primary/30" : "bg-blue-50 border-blue-300"
                          : isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border-white/[0.06] hover:bg-white/[0.06]" : "bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}>
                        <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 ${isSelected ? isDark ? "bg-primary/20" : "bg-blue-100" : isDark ? "bg-white/5" : "bg-slate-100"}`}>
                          <Icon className={`w-4 h-4 ${isSelected ? isDark ? "text-primary" : "text-blue-600" : "text-muted-foreground"}`} />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-foreground">{config.label}</p>
                          <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">{config.description}</p>
                        </div>
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl ${isDark ? "bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.06]" : "bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100"}`}>
                <h3 className="text-[10px] font-bold text-foreground mb-2">ملخص التصدير</h3>
                <div className="space-y-1.5 text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                  <div className="flex justify-between"><span>الصيغة:</span><span className="font-bold text-foreground">{formatConfig[selectedFormat].label}</span></div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between"><span>القالب:</span><span className="font-bold text-foreground">{templateConfig[selectedTemplate].label}</span></div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between"><span>عدد حالات الرصد:</span><span className="font-bold text-foreground">{leaks.length}</span></div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <motion.button onClick={handleExport} disabled={exporting}
                className={`w-full py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all ${exporting ? "opacity-70 cursor-not-allowed" : ""} ${isDark ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-[hsl(var(--primary))] to-[#6459A7] text-white" : "bg-gradient-to-r from-[hsl(var(--primary))] to-[#3b82f6] text-white"}`}
                whileHover={exporting ? {} : { scale: 1.02 }} whileTap={exporting ? {} : { scale: 0.98 }}>
                {exporting ? <><Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> جاري التصدير...</>
                  : exportDone ? <><CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4" /> تم التصدير بنجاح!</>
                  : <><Download className="w-4 h-4" /> تصدير التقرير</>}
              </motion.button>
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        </>
      )}
    </AnimatePresence>
  );
}

```

---

## `client/src/components/FloatingToolbar.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * FloatingToolbar — Ultra-premium floating utility toolbar
 * Non-intrusive slide-out panel with glass morphism effects
 * Tools: Font size (A-, A, A+), Print, Fullscreen, Screenshot, Contrast, Reset, Scroll-to-top
 * Appears on all pages via DashboardLayout
 */
import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  Wrench,
  Printer,
  Maximize,
  Minimize,
  Camera,
  Type,
  ArrowUp,
  Contrast,
  RotateCcw,
  X,
  Minus,
  Plus,
  Moon,
  Sun,
  Copy,
} from "lucide-react";
import { useTheme } from "@/contexts/ThemeContext";
import { toast } from "sonner";

/* ─── Font Size Manager ─── */
const FONT_SIZES = [
  { label: "صغير", scale: 0.85, key: "sm" },
  { label: "عادي", scale: 1.0, key: "md" },
  { label: "كبير", scale: 1.15, key: "lg" },
  { label: "أكبر", scale: 1.3, key: "xl" },
];

function applyFontScale(scale: number) {
  document.documentElement.style.fontSize = `${scale * 16}px`;
}

/* ─── Screenshot Utility ─── */
async function captureScreenshot(): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const { default: html2canvas } = await import("html2canvas");
    const mainContent = document.querySelector("main") || document.body;
    const canvas = await html2canvas(mainContent as HTMLElement, {
      scale: 2,
      useCORS: true,
      backgroundColor: null,
      logging: false,
    });
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.download = `rasid-screenshot-${Date.now()}.png`;
    link.href = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    link.click();
    toast.success("تم التقاط لقطة الشاشة بنجاح");
  } catch {
    try {
      const mainContent = document.querySelector("main") || document.body;
      const range = document.createRange();
      range.selectNodeContents(mainContent);
      const selection = window.getSelection();
      selection?.removeAllRanges();
      selection?.addRange(range);
      document.execCommand("copy");
      selection?.removeAllRanges();
      toast.info("تم نسخ المحتوى — استخدم أداة لقطة الشاشة في نظامك");
    } catch {
      toast.error("تعذر التقاط لقطة الشاشة — جرب Ctrl+Shift+S");
    }
  }
}

export default function FloatingToolbar() {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [fontSizeIndex, setFontSizeIndex] = useState(1); // default: عادي
  const [isFullscreen, setIsFullscreen] = useState(false);
  const [highContrast, setHighContrast] = useState(false);
  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
  const toolbarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const toggleRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);

  // Track if any setting has been changed from default
  const isModified = fontSizeIndex !== 1 || highContrast || isFullscreen;

  // Close on click outside
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (
        toolbarRef.current &&
        !toolbarRef.current.contains(e.target as Node) &&
        toggleRef.current &&
        !toggleRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)
      ) {
        setIsOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
  }, []);

  // Track fullscreen state
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = () => setIsFullscreen(!!document.fullscreenElement);
    document.addEventListener("fullscreenchange", handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("fullscreenchange", handler);
  }, []);

  // Keyboard shortcut: Escape to close
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === "Escape" && isOpen) setIsOpen(false);
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("keydown", handler);
  }, [isOpen]);

  // ─── Font Size Controls ───
  const decreaseFont = useCallback(() => {
    setFontSizeIndex((prev) => {
      const next = Math.max(0, prev - 1);
      applyFontScale(FONT_SIZES[next].scale);
      toast.info(`حجم الخط: ${FONT_SIZES[next].label}`);
      return next;
    });
  }, []);

  const increaseFont = useCallback(() => {
    setFontSizeIndex((prev) => {
      const next = Math.min(FONT_SIZES.length - 1, prev + 1);
      applyFontScale(FONT_SIZES[next].scale);
      toast.info(`حجم الخط: ${FONT_SIZES[next].label}`);
      return next;
    });
  }, []);

  const resetFont = useCallback(() => {
    setFontSizeIndex(1);
    applyFontScale(1.0);
    toast.info("تم إعادة حجم الخط للوضع الافتراضي");
  }, []);

  // ─── Print ───
  const handlePrint = useCallback(() => {
    setIsOpen(false);
    setTimeout(() => window.print(), 300);
  }, []);

  // ─── Fullscreen ───
  const toggleFullscreen = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      if (!document.fullscreenElement) {
        await document.documentElement.requestFullscreen();
        toast.success("وضع ملء الشاشة");
      } else {
        await document.exitFullscreen();
        toast.info("تم الخروج من ملء الشاشة");
      }
    } catch {
      toast.error("تعذر تبديل وضع ملء الشاشة");
    }
  }, []);

  // ─── Screenshot ───
  const handleScreenshot = useCallback(async () => {
    setIsOpen(false);
    toast.info("جاري التقاط لقطة الشاشة...");
    setTimeout(() => captureScreenshot(), 400);
  }, []);

  // ─── Scroll to Top ───
  const scrollToTop = useCallback(() => {
    const main = document.querySelector("main");
    if (main) {
      main.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
    } else {
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
    }
    toast.info("تم التمرير لأعلى الصفحة");
  }, []);

  // ─── High Contrast ───
  const toggleContrast = useCallback(() => {
    setHighContrast((prev) => {
      const next = !prev;
      if (next) {
        document.documentElement.classList.add("high-contrast");
        toast.info("تم تفعيل وضع التباين العالي");
      } else {
        document.documentElement.classList.remove("high-contrast");
        toast.info("تم إلغاء وضع التباين العالي");
      }
      return next;
    });
  }, []);

  // ─── Theme Toggle ───
  const toggleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    const next = theme === "dark" ? "light" : "dark";
    setTheme(next);
    toast.info(next === "dark" ? "الوضع الداكن" : "الوضع الفاتح");
  }, [theme, setTheme]);

  // ─── Copy Page URL ───
  const copyPageUrl = useCallback(() => {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href).then(() => {
      toast.success("تم نسخ رابط الصفحة");
    }).catch(() => {
      toast.error("تعذر نسخ الرابط");
    });
  }, []);

  // ─── RESET ALL to Normal ───
  const resetAll = useCallback(() => {
    // Reset font size
    setFontSizeIndex(1);
    applyFontScale(1.0);

    // Reset high contrast
    if (highContrast) {
      document.documentElement.classList.remove("high-contrast");
      setHighContrast(false);
    }

    // Exit fullscreen if active
    if (document.fullscreenElement) {
      document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});
    }

    toast.success("تم إعادة جميع الإعدادات للوضع الطبيعي");
  }, [highContrast]);

  const isDark = theme === "dark";

  return (
    <>
      {/* ═══ Toggle Button — Fixed on left edge ═══ */}
      <motion.button
        ref={toggleRef}
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className="fixed z-[9990] group"
        style={{ left: 0, top: "50%", transform: "translateY(-50%)" }}
        whileHover={{ x: 4 }}
        whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
        title="أدوات المنصة"
      >
        <div
          className={`
            flex items-center justify-center
            w-8 h-14 rounded-l-none rounded-r-xl
            transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg
            ${isOpen
              ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-primary/30"
              : "bg-card/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-l-0 border-border/50 text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary hover:border-primary/30 hover:shadow-primary/20"
            }
          `}
        >
          <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
            {isOpen ? (
              <motion.div key="close" initial={{ rotate: -90, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ rotate: 0, opacity: 1 }} exit={{ rotate: 90, opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}>
                <X className="w-4 h-4" />
              </motion.div>
            ) : (
              <motion.div key="open" initial={{ rotate: 90, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ rotate: 0, opacity: 1 }} exit={{ rotate: -90, opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}>
                <Wrench className="w-4 h-4" />
              </motion.div>
            )}
          </AnimatePresence>
        </div>
      </motion.button>

      {/* ═══ Toolbar Panel ═══ */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {isOpen && (
          <motion.div
            ref={toolbarRef}
            initial={{ x: -280, opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ x: 0, opacity: 1 }}
            exit={{ x: -280, opacity: 0 }}
            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
            className="fixed z-[9989] top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2"
            style={{ left: 36 }}
          >
            <div
              className={`
                w-56 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
                ${isDark
                  ? "bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-border/40 shadow-2xl shadow-black/30"
                  : "bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-gray-200/60 shadow-2xl shadow-gray-300/30"
                }
              `}
            >
              {/* Header */}
              <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-border/30">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-lg bg-primary/15 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Wrench className="w-3 h-3 text-primary" />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-xs font-bold text-foreground">أدوات المنصة</p>
                    <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">Platform Utilities</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Font Size Section */}
              <div className="px-3 py-2.5 border-b border-border/20">
                <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground font-semibold mb-2 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                  <Type className="w-3 h-3" /> حجم الخط
                </p>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <button
                    onClick={decreaseFont}
                    disabled={fontSizeIndex === 0}
                    className="flex-1 h-7 rounded-lg bg-secondary/60 hover:bg-secondary text-foreground text-xs font-bold transition-all disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-0.5"
                  >
                    <Minus className="w-3 h-3" />
                    <span className="text-[10px]">أ</span>
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={resetFont}
                    className={`flex-1 h-7 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all flex items-center justify-center ${
                      fontSizeIndex === 1
                        ? "bg-primary/15 text-primary border border-primary/20"
                        : "bg-secondary/60 text-foreground hover:bg-secondary"
                    }`}
                  >
                    {FONT_SIZES[fontSizeIndex].label}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={increaseFont}
                    disabled={fontSizeIndex === FONT_SIZES.length - 1}
                    className="flex-1 h-7 rounded-lg bg-secondary/60 hover:bg-secondary text-foreground text-xs font-bold transition-all disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-0.5"
                  >
                    <Plus className="w-3 h-3" />
                    <span className="text-sm">أ</span>
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Tools Grid */}
              <div className="px-3 py-2.5 space-y-1">
                {/* Print */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={Printer}
                  label="طباعة الصفحة"
                  onClick={handlePrint}
                  isDark={isDark}
                />

                {/* Fullscreen */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={isFullscreen ? Minimize : Maximize}
                  label={isFullscreen ? "إلغاء ملء الشاشة" : "ملء الشاشة"}
                  onClick={toggleFullscreen}
                  isDark={isDark}
                  isActive={isFullscreen}
                />

                {/* Screenshot */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={Camera}
                  label="لقطة شاشة"
                  onClick={handleScreenshot}
                  isDark={isDark}
                />

                {/* Theme Toggle */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={isDark ? Sun : Moon}
                  label={isDark ? "الوضع الفاتح" : "الوضع الداكن"}
                  onClick={toggleTheme}
                  isDark={isDark}
                />

                {/* High Contrast */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={Contrast}
                  label="تباين عالي"
                  onClick={toggleContrast}
                  isDark={isDark}
                  isActive={highContrast}
                />

                {/* Copy URL */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={Copy}
                  label="نسخ رابط الصفحة"
                  onClick={copyPageUrl}
                  isDark={isDark}
                />

                {/* Scroll to Top */}
                <ToolButton
                  icon={ArrowUp}
                  label="العودة للأعلى"
                  onClick={scrollToTop}
                  isDark={isDark}
                />
              </div>

              {/* ═══ RESET ALL BUTTON ═══ */}
              <div className="px-3 pb-2.5">
                <button
                  onClick={resetAll}
                  className={`
                    w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold
                    transition-all duration-300
                    ${isModified
                      ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500/15 to-orange-500/15 text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/25 hover:from-amber-500/25 hover:to-orange-500/25 hover:border-amber-500/40 shadow-sm"
                      : "bg-secondary/40 text-muted-foreground/50 border border-border/20 cursor-default"
                    }
                  `}
                  disabled={!isModified}
                >
                  <RotateCcw className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${isModified ? "animate-pulse" : ""}`} />
                  إعادة للوضع الطبيعي
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Footer */}
              <div className="px-3 py-2 border-t border-border/20">
                <p className="text-[8px] text-muted-foreground/60 text-center">
                  Esc للإغلاق • منصة راصد
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </>
  );
}

/* ─── Reusable Tool Button ─── */
function ToolButton({
  icon: Icon,
  label,
  onClick,
  isDark,
  isActive = false,
}: {
  icon: React.ElementType;
  label: string;
  onClick: () => void;
  isDark: boolean;
  isActive?: boolean;
}) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`
        w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 px-2.5 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium
        transition-all duration-200 group
        ${isActive
          ? "bg-primary/15 text-primary border border-primary/20"
          : isDark
            ? "hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
            : "hover:bg-gray-100/80 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
        }
      `}
    >
      <div
        className={`
          w-7 h-7 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-all
          ${isActive
            ? "bg-primary/20 text-primary"
            : "bg-secondary/50 text-muted-foreground group-hover:bg-primary/10 group-hover:text-primary"
          }
        `}
      >
        <Icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
      </div>
      <span>{label}</span>
    </button>
  );
}

```

## `client/src/components/FormattedAIResponse.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * FormattedAIResponse — Renders AI chat responses with navigation consent
 * Includes NavigationConsentBanner for page navigation approval
 */
import React from "react";
import { NavigationConsentDialog } from "./NavigationConsentDialog";

interface FormattedAIResponseProps {
  content: string;
  navigationTarget?: string;
  onNavigate?: (target: string) => void;
}

/**
 * NavigationConsentBanner — inline banner for سماح بالانتقال
 */
function NavigationConsentBanner({
  target,
  onAllow,
  onDeny,
}: {
  target: string;
  onAllow: () => void;
  onDeny: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 bg-purple-50 rounded-lg border border-purple-200 mt-2">
      <span className="text-sm text-purple-800">
        هل تريد الانتقال إلى <strong>{target}</strong>؟
      </span>
      <button
        onClick={onAllow}
        className="px-3 py-1 text-xs bg-purple-600 text-white rounded hover:bg-purple-700"
      >
        سماح بالانتقال
      </button>
      <button
        onClick={onDeny}
        className="px-3 py-1 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 rounded hover:bg-gray-300"
      >
        البقاء هنا
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

export function FormattedAIResponse({
  content,
  navigationTarget,
  onNavigate,
}: FormattedAIResponseProps) {
  const [showConsent, setShowConsent] = React.useState(!!navigationTarget);

  return (
    <div className="formatted-ai-response" dir="rtl">
      <div
        className="prose prose-sm max-w-none"
        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: content }}
      />
      {showConsent && navigationTarget && (
        <NavigationConsentBanner
          target={navigationTarget}
          onAllow={() => {
            onNavigate?.(navigationTarget);
            setShowConsent(false);
          }}
          onDeny={() => setShowConsent(false)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default FormattedAIResponse;

```

## `client/src/components/GlassCard.tsx`

```tsx
import { useSoundEffects } from '@/hooks/useSoundEffects';
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';

interface GlassCardProps {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  onClick?: () => void;
  hoverLift?: boolean;
  scanLine?: boolean;
  glowColor?: string;
}

export function GlassCard({
  children,
  className = '',
  onClick,
  hoverLift = true,
  scanLine = true,
  glowColor,
}: GlassCardProps) {
  const { playHover } = useSoundEffects();

  return (
    <div
      className={`glass-card gold-sweep group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl p-6 cursor-pointer ${className}`}
      style={glowColor ? { borderColor: `${glowColor}30` } : undefined}
      onMouseEnter={() => playHover()}
      onClick={onClick}
    >
      {/* Scan Line Effect */}
      {scanLine && (
        <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500 pointer-events-none">
          <div className="absolute inset-x-0 h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[var(--sdaia-primary)]/20 to-transparent animate-scan" />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Glow border on hover */}
      <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500 pointer-events-none"
        style={{
          boxShadow: glowColor
            ? `inset 0 0 0 1px ${glowColor}40, 0 0 20px ${glowColor}15`
            : 'inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(120, 100, 200, 0.15), 0 0 20px rgba(120, 100, 200, 0.08)',
        }}
      />

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="relative z-10">{children}</div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## `client/src/components/GlobalFilterBar.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * GlobalFilterBar - Unified filter bar for all analytics pages
 * Provides time range, sector, severity, and platform filters
 */
import { useFilters } from "@/contexts/FilterContext";
import { breachRecords, allSectors, allSeverities, allPlatforms } from "@/lib/breachData";
import { Filter, RotateCcw, Calendar, Building2, Shield, Globe } from "lucide-react";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { useTheme } from "@/contexts/ThemeContext";

const timeRangeOptions = [
  { value: "all", label: "الكل" },
  { value: "last30", label: "30 يوم" },
  { value: "last90", label: "90 يوم" },
  { value: "last180", label: "180 يوم" },
  { value: "2025", label: "2025" },
  { value: "2024", label: "2024" },
];

export default function GlobalFilterBar() {
  const { filters, setFilters, filteredRecords, resetFilters } = useFilters();
  const { theme } = useTheme();
  const isDark = theme === "dark";
  const total = breachRecords.length;
  const filtered = filteredRecords.length;
  const isFiltered = filters.timeRange !== "all" || filters.sector !== "all" || filters.severity !== "all" || filters.platform !== "all";

  const selectClass = `text-xs rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 border outline-none cursor-pointer ${isDark ? "bg-[rgba(13,21,41,0.6)] border-primary/20 text-white" : "bg-white border-border text-gray-800"}`;

  return (
    <div className={`flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border ${isDark ? "bg-[rgba(13,21,41,0.4)] border-primary/10 backdrop-blur-sm" : "bg-white border-border"}`} dir="rtl">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        <Filter className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary" />
        <span className="font-medium">فلترة</span>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
        <Calendar className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
        <select className={selectClass} value={filters.timeRange} onChange={(e) => setFilters((prev) => ({ ...prev, timeRange: e.target.value }))}>
          {timeRangeOptions.map((opt) => (<option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
        <Building2 className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
        <select className={selectClass} value={filters.sector} onChange={(e) => setFilters((prev) => ({ ...prev, sector: e.target.value }))}>
          <option value="all">كل القطاعات</option>
          {allSectors.sort().map((s) => (<option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
        <Shield className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
        <select className={selectClass} value={filters.severity} onChange={(e) => setFilters((prev) => ({ ...prev, severity: e.target.value }))}>
          <option value="all">كل المستويات</option>
          {allSeverities.map((s) => (<option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
        <Globe className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
        <select className={selectClass} value={filters.platform} onChange={(e) => setFilters((prev) => ({ ...prev, platform: e.target.value }))}>
          <option value="all">كل المنصات</option>
          {allPlatforms.map((p) => (<option key={p} value={p}>{p}</option>))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-[10px] ${isFiltered ? "border-[#f59e0b] text-[#f59e0b]" : "border-[hsl(var(--primary))] text-primary"}`}>
        {filtered}/{total} حالة رصد
      </Badge>

      {isFiltered && (
        <button onClick={resetFilters} className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-[#ef4444] hover:text-[#dc2626] transition-colors">
          <RotateCcw className="w-3 h-3" />
          إعادة تعيين
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```
