## `client/src/components/atlas/IncidentPanel.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * IncidentDetailPanel — Slide-in panel for individual incident details
 * Design: Purple/Navy Glassmorphism — Sovereign Premium
 * Theme-aware: supports dark/light via useThemeColors
 * FOCUS: Exposed Records (discovered data) highlighted prominently
 * Includes: Evidence Gallery, AI Analysis, Samples Table, Price, Source URL
 */
import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  X, ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, Calendar, Globe, AlertTriangle, MapPin,
  Building2, Tag, Skull, Server, ExternalLink, FileText,
  Database, Fingerprint, Image as ImageIcon, DollarSign, Brain, FileCode,
  Link2, Crosshair, Eye, Shield, Table2, ZoomIn, ChevronDown, ChevronUp
} from "lucide-react";
import { SEVERITY_COLORS, SOURCE_COLORS, fmtFull } from "@/lib/atlas/design";
import type { IncidentDetail } from "@/contexts/atlas/DataContext";
import PdfExportButton from "@/components/atlas/PdfExport";
import { useThemeColors } from "@/hooks/atlas/useThemeColors";

interface Props {
  incident: IncidentDetail | null;
  onClose: () => void;
  onBack?: () => void;
}

const TYPE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'BreachForums': 'BreachForums',
  'Telegram': 'تليجرام',
  'PasteSite': 'موقع لصق',
  'DarkWeb': 'دارك ويب',
  'Screenshot': 'لقطة شاشة',
  'DataProof': 'إثبات البيانات',
  'Original': 'المصدر الأصلي',
  'evidence': 'دليل',
};

const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  'BreachForums': '#DC3545',
  'Telegram': '#8B7FD4',
  'PasteSite': '#D4AF37',
  'DarkWeb': '#FF4D6A',
  'Screenshot': '#5ECEC9',
  'DataProof': '#5CB85C',
  'Original': '#5B9BD5',
  'evidence': '#8B7FD4',
};

export default function IncidentPanel({ incident, onClose, onBack }: Props) {
  const tc = useThemeColors();
  const [selectedImg, setSelectedImg] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [showAllSamples, setShowAllSamples] = useState(false);
  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({
    exposed: true, evidence: true, samples: true, pii: true, details: true, ai: true
  });

  const toggleSection = (key: string) => setExpandedSections(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] }));

  if (!incident) return null;

  const sevColor = SEVERITY_COLORS[incident.severity] || "#4ECDC4";
  const srcColor = SOURCE_COLORS[incident.source] || "#8B7FD4";

  // Parse samples data
  const samplesData = useMemo(() => {
    if (!incident.samples) return [];
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(incident.samples);
      return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
    } catch { return []; }
  }, [incident.samples]);

  // Get sample fields (column headers)
  const sampleFields = useMemo(() => {
    if (samplesData.length === 0) return [];
    const allKeys = new Set<string>();
    samplesData.forEach((s: any) => Object.keys(s).forEach(k => allKeys.add(k)));
    return Array.from(allKeys);
  }, [samplesData]);

  const displayedSamples = showAllSamples ? samplesData : samplesData.slice(0, 10);
  const totalSampleRecords = incident.totalSampleRecords || samplesData.length;

  const infoRows = [
    { icon: Calendar, label: "تاريخ الاكتشاف", value: incident.date || "غير محدد" },
    { icon: Globe, label: "المصدر", value: incident.source, color: srcColor },
    { icon: AlertTriangle, label: "مستوى التأثير", value: incident.severity, color: sevColor },
    { icon: MapPin, label: "المنطقة", value: incident.region || "غير محددة" },
    { icon: Crosshair, label: "المدينة", value: incident.city || "غير محددة" },
    { icon: Building2, label: "القطاع", value: incident.sector },
    { icon: Tag, label: "الحالة", value: incident.status === "documented" ? "حالة رصد موثقة" : incident.status === "verified" ? "حالة رصد مُدّعاة" : incident.status },
    { icon: Skull, label: "جهة التهديد", value: incident.threatActor || "غير معروفة" },
    { icon: Server, label: "طريقة الوصول المُدّعاة", value: incident.breachMethod || "غير محددة" },
    { icon: ExternalLink, label: "المنصة", value: incident.sourcePlatform || "غير محددة" },
  ];

  const detailBg = tc.isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.03)";
  const detailBorder = tc.isDark ? "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" : "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)";
  const defaultTextColor = tc.isDark ? "#e2e8f0" : "#334155";

  const evidenceUrls = Array.isArray(incident.evidenceUrls) ? incident.evidenceUrls : [];
  const piiTypes = Array.isArray(incident.piiTypes) ? incident.piiTypes : (typeof incident.piiTypes === 'string' ? (incident.piiTypes as string).split(',').map((s: string) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean) : []);

  // Section header component
  const SectionHeader = ({ icon: Icon, title, count, sectionKey, color = "#8B7FD4", highlight = false }: any) => (
    <button
      onClick={() => toggleSection(sectionKey)}
      className="w-full flex items-center justify-between mb-3"
    >
      <h4 className={`text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 ${highlight ? 'text-base' : ''}`} style={{ color: highlight ? sevColor : tc.textSecondary }}>
        <Icon className={`${highlight ? 'w-5 h-5' : 'w-4 h-4'}`} style={{ color }} />
        {title}
        {count !== undefined && <span className="mono-num text-xs" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>({count})</span>}
      </h4>
      {expandedSections[sectionKey] ? <ChevronUp className="w-4 h-4" style={{ color: tc.textDim }} /> : <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" style={{ color: tc.textDim }} />}
    </button>
  );

  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className={`fixed inset-0 ${tc.isDark ? "bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" : "bg-black/20"} z-[55]`} onClick={onClose} />
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -60, ...(tc.isDark ? { filter: "blur(12px)" } : {}) }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0, ...(tc.isDark ? { filter: "blur(0px)" } : {}) }}
        exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -60, ...(tc.isDark ? { filter: "blur(12px)" } : {}) }}
        transition={{ type: "spring", damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }}
        className="fixed inset-0 md:inset-y-0 md:right-0 md:left-auto w-full md:w-[620px] z-[60] overflow-y-auto"
        style={{ background: tc.panelGradient, ...(tc.isDark ? { backdropFilter: "blur(40px)" } : {}) }}
      >
        <div className="p-6">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
            {onBack ? (
              <button onClick={onBack} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm hover:opacity-80 transition-colors group" style={{ color: tc.textMuted }}>
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
                <span>العودة</span>
              </button>
            ) : <div />}
            <button onClick={onClose} className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">
              <X className="w-4 h-4" style={{ color: tc.textDim }} />
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* ID & Export */}
          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="mono-num text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full font-medium" style={{ background: `${sevColor}15`, color: sevColor, border: `1px solid ${sevColor}30` }}>
              {incident.id}
            </span>
            <PdfExportButton incident={incident} />
          </div>

          {/* Title */}
          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2 leading-relaxed" style={{ color: tc.textPrimary }}>{incident.title}</h3>
          {incident.titleEn && incident.titleEn !== incident.title && (
            <p className="text-sm font-mono mb-4" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>{incident.titleEn}</p>
          )}

          {/* ===== EXPOSED RECORDS - MAIN HIGHLIGHT ===== */}
          <div className="glass-card p-6 mb-4 relative overflow-hidden" style={{ border: `2px solid ${sevColor}40` }}>
            <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-15" style={{ background: `radial-gradient(circle at center, ${sevColor}, transparent 70%)` }} />
            <div className="relative">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <Eye className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color: sevColor }} />
                <span className="text-sm font-bold" style={{ color: sevColor }}>السجلات المكشوفة</span>
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="text-center">
                  <div className="mono-num text-4xl font-black" style={{ color: sevColor }}>{totalSampleRecords.toLocaleString()}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs mt-1 font-medium" style={{ color: tc.textMuted }}>سجل مكشوف فعلياً</div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-center" style={{ opacity: 0.6 }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>{fmtFull(incident.records)}</div>
                  <div className="text-[10px] mt-1" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>ادعاء الناشر (غير مؤكد)</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              {samplesData.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mt-3 pt-3" style={{ borderTop: `1px solid ${sevColor}20` }}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
                    <span style={{ color: tc.textMuted }}>{sampleFields.length} حقل بيانات مكشوف</span>
                    <span style={{ color: tc.textMuted }}>{piiTypes.length} نوع بيانات شخصية</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* ===== EVIDENCE GALLERY - PROMINENT ===== */}
          {evidenceUrls.length > 0 && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4" style={{ border: "1px solid rgba(220,53,69,0.2)" }}>
              <SectionHeader icon={ImageIcon} title="صور الأدلة" count={evidenceUrls.length} sectionKey="evidence" color="#DC3545" highlight />
              {expandedSections.evidence && (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  {evidenceUrls.map((ev, i) => {
                    const color = TYPE_COLORS[ev.type] || '#8B7FD4';
                    return (
                      <motion.div
                        key={i}
                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
                        transition={{ delay: i * 0.05 }}
                        className="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden cursor-pointer group"
                        style={{ border: `1px solid ${color}25`, aspectRatio: '16/10' }}
                        onClick={() => setSelectedImg(i)}
                      >
                        <img
                          src={ev.url}
                          alt={ev.type}
                          className="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105"
                          loading="lazy"
                        />
                        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/70 via-transparent to-transparent" />
                        <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                          <ZoomIn className="w-5 h-5 text-white drop-shadow-lg" />
                        </div>
                        <div className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 left-0 p-2 flex items-center justify-between">
                          <span className="text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium" style={{
                            background: `${color}25`, color, border: `1px solid ${color}40`
                          }}>
                            {TYPE_LABELS[ev.type] || ev.type}
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-[9px] text-white/70">دليل #{i + 1}</span>
                        </div>
                      </motion.div>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* ===== DATA SAMPLES TABLE - PROMINENT ===== */}
          {samplesData.length > 0 && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4" style={{ border: "1px solid rgba(78,205,196,0.2)" }}>
              <SectionHeader icon={Table2} title="السجلات المكشوفة - عينات فعلية" count={samplesData.length} sectionKey="samples" color="#4ECDC4" highlight />
              {expandedSections.samples && (
                <>
                  <div className="rounded-xl overflow-hidden" style={{ border: detailBorder }}>
                    <div className="overflow-x-auto" style={{ maxHeight: showAllSamples ? 600 : 350 }}>
                      <table className="w-full text-[10px]">
                        <thead>
                          <tr style={{ background: tc.isDark ? "rgba(78,205,196,0.08)" : "rgba(78,205,196,0.05)" }}>
                            <th className="px-2 py-2 text-right font-bold sticky top-0" style={{ color: "#4ECDC4", background: tc.isDark ? "rgba(20,20,35,0.95)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.95)" }}>#</th>
                            {sampleFields.slice(0, 8).map((field, i) => (
                              <th key={i} className="px-2 py-2 text-right font-bold sticky top-0 whitespace-nowrap" style={{ color: "#4ECDC4", background: tc.isDark ? "rgba(20,20,35,0.95)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.95)" }}>
                                {field}
                              </th>
                            ))}
                          </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                          {displayedSamples.map((sample: any, i: number) => (
                            <tr key={i} className="transition-colors" style={{ borderBottom: detailBorder, background: i % 2 === 0 ? 'transparent' : (tc.isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.01)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.01)") }}>
                              <td className="px-2 py-1.5 mono-num" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>{i + 1}</td>
                              {sampleFields.slice(0, 8).map((field, j) => (
                                <td key={j} className="px-2 py-1.5 whitespace-nowrap max-w-[120px] truncate" style={{ color: defaultTextColor }}>
                                  {String(sample[field] || "-")}
                                </td>
                              ))}
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {samplesData.length > 10 && (
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setShowAllSamples(!showAllSamples)}
                      className="mt-3 w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-colors"
                      style={{ background: "rgba(78,205,196,0.08)", color: "#4ECDC4", border: "1px solid rgba(78,205,196,0.15)" }}
                    >
                      {showAllSamples ? `إخفاء (عرض 10 فقط)` : `عرض الكل (${samplesData.length} سجل)`}
                    </button>
                  )}
                  <div className="mt-2 text-[10px] text-center" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>
                    عرض {displayedSamples.length} من أصل {totalSampleRecords.toLocaleString()} سجل مكشوف
                  </div>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* ===== PII TYPES ===== */}
          {piiTypes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4">
              <SectionHeader icon={Fingerprint} title="أنواع البيانات المكشوفة" count={piiTypes.length} sectionKey="pii" color="#F0D060" />
              {expandedSections.pii && (
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                  {piiTypes.map((pii, j) => (
                    <span key={j} className="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full font-medium" style={{ background: "rgba(240,208,96,0.08)", color: "#F0D060", border: "1px solid rgba(240,208,96,0.15)" }}>
                      {pii}
                    </span>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* ===== DESCRIPTION ===== */}
          {incident.description && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center gap-2" style={{ color: tc.textSecondary }}>
                <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-[#4ECDC4]" />
                وصف حالة الرصد
              </h4>
              <p className="text-sm leading-relaxed" style={{ color: tc.textMuted }}>{incident.description}</p>
              {incident.descriptionEn && (
                <p className="text-xs leading-relaxed mt-2 font-mono" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>{incident.descriptionEn}</p>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* ===== INCIDENT DETAILS ===== */}
          <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4">
            <SectionHeader icon={Database} title="تفاصيل حالة الرصد" sectionKey="details" color="#8B7FD4" />
            {expandedSections.details && (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 md:gap-3">
                {infoRows.map((row, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="p-2.5 md:p-3 rounded-xl" style={{ background: detailBg, border: detailBorder }}>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1.5">
                      <row.icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: tc.textDim }} />
                      <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>{row.label}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium" style={{ color: row.color || defaultTextColor }}>{row.value}</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium" style={{ color: row.color || defaultTextColor }}>{row.value}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {piiTypes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-6">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center gap-2" style={{ color: tc.textSecondary }}>
                <Fingerprint className="w-4 h-4 text-[#F0D060]" />
                أنواع البيانات المكشوفة
                <span className="mono-num text-xs" style={{ color: tc.textDim }}>({piiTypes.length})</span>
              </h4>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {piiTypes.map((pii, j) => (
                  <span key={j} className="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full font-medium" style={{ background: "rgba(240,208,96,0.08)", color: "#F0D060", border: "1px solid rgba(240,208,96,0.15)" }}>
                    {pii}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* ===== PRICE ===== */}
          {incident.price && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center gap-2" style={{ color: tc.textSecondary }}>
                <DollarSign className="w-4 h-4 text-[#FF6B7A]" />
                السعر المطلوب
              </h4>
              <span className="mono-num text-lg font-bold text-[#FF6B7A]">{incident.price}</span>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* ===== AI ANALYSIS ===== */}
          {incident.aiAnalysis && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4">
              <SectionHeader icon={Brain} title="تحليل الذكاء الاصطناعي" sectionKey="ai" color="#8B7FD4" />
              {expandedSections.ai && (
                <p className="text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line" style={{ color: tc.textMuted }}>{incident.aiAnalysis}</p>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* ===== SOURCE URL ===== */}
          {incident.sourceUrl && (
            <div className="glass-card p-5 mb-4">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 flex items-center gap-2" style={{ color: tc.textSecondary }}>
                <Link2 className="w-4 h-4 text-[#5B9BD5]" />
                رابط المصدر
              </h4>
              <a href={incident.sourceUrl} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"
                className="text-sm font-mono break-all hover:underline" style={{ color: "#5B9BD5" }}>
                {incident.sourceUrl}
              </a>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      {/* ===== FULLSCREEN IMAGE VIEWER ===== */}
      {selectedImg !== null && evidenceUrls[selectedImg] && (
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
          exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
          className="fixed inset-0 z-[70] flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4"
          onClick={() => setSelectedImg(null)}
        >
          <div className={`absolute inset-0 ${tc.isDark ? "bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md" : "bg-black/70"}`} />
          <div className="relative z-10 max-w-4xl w-full" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span className="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full font-medium" style={{
                  background: `${TYPE_COLORS[evidenceUrls[selectedImg].type] || '#8B7FD4'}25`,
                  color: TYPE_COLORS[evidenceUrls[selectedImg].type] || '#8B7FD4',
                  border: `1px solid ${TYPE_COLORS[evidenceUrls[selectedImg].type] || '#8B7FD4'}40`
                }}>
                  {TYPE_LABELS[evidenceUrls[selectedImg].type] || evidenceUrls[selectedImg].type}
                </span>
                <span className="mono-num text-xs text-gray-500">دليل {selectedImg + 1} من {evidenceUrls.length}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setSelectedImg(Math.max(0, selectedImg - 1))}
                  disabled={selectedImg === 0}
                  className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/10 disabled:opacity-30 transition-all"
                >
                  <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setSelectedImg(Math.min(evidenceUrls.length - 1, selectedImg + 1))}
                  disabled={selectedImg === evidenceUrls.length - 1}
                  className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/10 disabled:opacity-30 transition-all"
                >
                  <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => setSelectedImg(null)} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all">
                  <X className="w-5 h-5" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <motion.img
              key={selectedImg}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
              src={evidenceUrls[selectedImg].url}
              alt={evidenceUrls[selectedImg].type}
              className="w-full rounded-xl shadow-2xl max-h-[80vh] object-contain"
            />
          </div>
        </motion.div>
      )}
    </AnimatePresence>
  );
}

```

---

## `client/src/components/atlas/KpiCard.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * KpiCard — Glassmorphism stat card with colored side bar
 * Design: Purple/Navy Glassmorphism — Sovereign Premium
 * Mobile: Compact layout with smaller text and icons
 */
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { Eye } from "lucide-react";
import { useThemeColors } from "@/hooks/atlas/useThemeColors";
import { fmtNum, ACCENT_ICON_COLORS } from "@/lib/atlas/design";

function useCountUp(target: number, duration = 2200, start = true) {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!start) return;
    let startTime: number;
    const step = (timestamp: number) => {
      if (!startTime) startTime = timestamp;
      const progress = Math.min((timestamp - startTime) / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
      setCount(Math.floor(eased * target));
      if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    };
    requestAnimationFrame(step);
  }, [target, duration, start]);
  return count;
}

interface KpiCardProps {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  icon: any;
  accent: string;
  delay?: number;
  inView?: boolean;
  onClick?: () => void;
  subtitle?: string;
}

export default function KpiCard({ label, value, icon: Icon, accent, delay = 0, inView = true, onClick, subtitle }: KpiCardProps) {
  const tc = useThemeColors();
  const animatedValue = useCountUp(value, 2200, inView);
  const colors = ACCENT_ICON_COLORS[accent] || ACCENT_ICON_COLORS.teal;

  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40, ...(tc.isDark ? { filter: "blur(8px)" } : {}) }}
      animate={inView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0, ...(tc.isDark ? { filter: "blur(0px)" } : {}) } : {}}
      transition={{ duration: 0.7, delay, ease: "easeOut" as const }}
      className={`kpi-card p-2 sm:p-3 md:p-5 drill-indicator ${onClick ? "cursor-pointer" : ""}`}
      data-accent={accent}
      onClick={onClick}
    >
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1.5 sm:mb-2 md:mb-3">
        <span className={`text-[10px] sm:text-xs md:text-sm ${tc.isDark ? "text-gray-400" : "text-[#4a4578]"} font-medium leading-tight line-clamp-2`}>{label}</span>
        <div className="kpi-icon !w-7 !h-7 sm:!w-9 sm:!h-9 md:!w-12 md:!h-12 !rounded-lg sm:!rounded-[10px] md:!rounded-[14px] flex-shrink-0" data-accent={accent}>
          <Icon className="w-3 h-3 sm:w-4 sm:h-4 md:w-5 md:h-5 relative z-10" style={{ color: colors.icon }} />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className={`mono-num text-base sm:text-xl md:text-3xl font-bold ${tc.isDark ? "text-white" : "text-[#1e1b4b]"}`}>
        {fmtNum(animatedValue)}
      </div>
      {subtitle && (
        <div className="text-[9px] sm:text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5 sm:mt-1">{subtitle}</div>
      )}
      {onClick && (
        <div className="text-[8px] sm:text-[10px] text-gray-600 mt-1 sm:mt-2 flex items-center gap-1">
          <Eye className="w-2.5 h-2.5 sm:w-3 sm:h-3" /> انقر للتفاصيل
        </div>
      )}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

```

## `client/src/components/atlas/Map.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * GOOGLE MAPS FRONTEND INTEGRATION - ESSENTIAL GUIDE
 *
 * USAGE FROM PARENT COMPONENT:
 * ======
 *
 * const mapRef = useRef<google.maps.Map | null>(null);
 *
 * <MapView
 *   initialCenter={{ lat: 40.7128, lng: -74.0060 }}
 *   initialZoom={15}
 *   onMapReady={(map) => {
 *     mapRef.current = map; // Store to control map from parent anytime, google map itself is in charge of the re-rendering, not react state.
 * </MapView>
 *
 * ======
 * Available Libraries and Core Features:
 * -------------------------------
 * 📍 MARKER (from `marker` library)
 * - Attaches to map using { map, position }
 * new google.maps.marker.AdvancedMarkerElement({
 *   map,
 *   position: { lat: 37.7749, lng: -122.4194 },
 *   title: "San Francisco",
 * });
 *
 * -------------------------------
 * 🏢 PLACES (from `places` library)
 * - Does not attach directly to map; use data with your map manually.
 * const place = new google.maps.places.Place({ id: PLACE_ID });
 * await place.fetchFields({ fields: ["displayName", "location"] });
 * map.setCenter(place.location);
 * new google.maps.marker.AdvancedMarkerElement({ map, position: place.location });
 *
 * -------------------------------
 * 🧭 GEOCODER (from `geocoding` library)
 * - Standalone service; manually apply results to map.
 * const geocoder = new google.maps.Geocoder();
 * geocoder.geocode({ address: "New York" }, (results, status) => {
 *   if (status === "OK" && results[0]) {
 *     map.setCenter(results[0].geometry.location);
 *     new google.maps.marker.AdvancedMarkerElement({
 *       map,
 *       position: results[0].geometry.location,
 *     });
 *   }
 * });
 *
 * -------------------------------
 * 📐 GEOMETRY (from `geometry` library)
 * - Pure utility functions; not attached to map.
 * const dist = google.maps.geometry.spherical.computeDistanceBetween(p1, p2);
 *
 * -------------------------------
 * 🛣️ ROUTES (from `routes` library)
 * - Combines DirectionsService (standalone) + DirectionsRenderer (map-attached)
 * const directionsService = new google.maps.DirectionsService();
 * const directionsRenderer = new google.maps.DirectionsRenderer({ map });
 * directionsService.route(
 *   { origin, destination, travelMode: "DRIVING" },
 *   (res, status) => status === "OK" && directionsRenderer.setDirections(res)
 * );
 *
 * -------------------------------
 * 🌦️ MAP LAYERS (attach directly to map)
 * - new google.maps.TrafficLayer().setMap(map);
 * - new google.maps.TransitLayer().setMap(map);
 * - new google.maps.BicyclingLayer().setMap(map);
 *
 * -------------------------------
 * ✅ SUMMARY
 * - “map-attached” → AdvancedMarkerElement, DirectionsRenderer, Layers.
 * - “standalone” → Geocoder, DirectionsService, DistanceMatrixService, ElevationService.
 * - “data-only” → Place, Geometry utilities.
 */

/// <reference types="@types/google.maps" />

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { usePersistFn } from "@/hooks/atlas/usePersistFn";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

declare global {
  interface Window {
    google?: typeof google;
  }
}

const API_KEY = import.meta.env.VITE_FRONTEND_FORGE_API_KEY;
const FORGE_BASE_URL =
  import.meta.env.VITE_FRONTEND_FORGE_API_URL ||
  "https://forge.butterfly-effect.dev";
const MAPS_PROXY_URL = `${FORGE_BASE_URL}/v1/maps/proxy`;

function loadMapScript() {
  return new Promise(resolve => {
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = `${MAPS_PROXY_URL}/maps/api/js?key=${API_KEY}&v=weekly&libraries=marker,places,geocoding,geometry`;
    script.async = true;
    script.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
    script.onload = () => {
      resolve(null);
      script.remove(); // Clean up immediately
    };
    script.onerror = () => {
      console.error("Failed to load Google Maps script");
    };
    document.head.appendChild(script);
  });
}

interface MapViewProps {
  className?: string;
  initialCenter?: google.maps.LatLngLiteral;
  initialZoom?: number;
  onMapReady?: (map: google.maps.Map) => void;
}

export function MapView({
  className,
  initialCenter = { lat: 37.7749, lng: -122.4194 },
  initialZoom = 12,
  onMapReady,
}: MapViewProps) {
  const mapContainer = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const map = useRef<google.maps.Map | null>(null);

  const init = usePersistFn(async () => {
    await loadMapScript();
    if (!mapContainer.current) {
      console.error("Map container not found");
      return;
    }
    map.current = new window.google.maps.Map(mapContainer.current, {
      zoom: initialZoom,
      center: initialCenter,
      mapTypeControl: true,
      fullscreenControl: true,
      zoomControl: true,
      streetViewControl: true,
      mapId: "DEMO_MAP_ID",
    });
    if (onMapReady) {
      onMapReady(map.current);
    }
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    init();
  }, [init]);

  return (
    <div ref={mapContainer} className={cn("w-full h-[500px]", className)} />
  );
}

```

```tsx
/**
 * PageShell — Consistent page wrapper with background and animations
 * Design: Purple/Navy Glassmorphism — Sovereign Premium
 */
import { ReactNode } from "react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";

interface PageShellProps {
  children: ReactNode;
}

export default function PageShell({ children }: PageShellProps) {
  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 12 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
      transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: "easeOut" }}
      className="min-h-[calc(100vh-80px)]"
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}
```

## `client/src/components/atlas/PatternCompare.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * Pattern Comparison Component — Side-by-Side Analysis
 * Design: Sovereign Atlas — Navy/Teal/Gold
 */

import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import { useThemeColors } from "@/hooks/atlas/useThemeColors";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  X, GitCompareArrows, Database, AlertTriangle, Building2,
  Layers, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight, Minus, Check
} from "lucide-react";
import {
  RadarChart, Radar, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis,
  ResponsiveContainer, BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip as RechartsTooltip, Cell, Legend
} from "recharts";

interface PatternItem {
  id: string;
  source: string;
  sourceKey: string;
  severity: string;
  severityKey: string;
  count: number;
  records: number;
  sectorCount: number;
  sectors: string[];
  piiTypes: string[];
  topIncidents: { id: string; title: string; records: number; date: string; sector: string }[];
  incidents: any[];
}

interface PatternCompareProps {
  patterns: PatternItem[];
  onClose: () => void;
}

const SEVERITY_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  "واسع النطاق": "#DC3545",
  "مرتفع": "#FF8C42",
  "متوسط": "#D4AF37",
  "محدود": "hsl(var(--primary))",
};

const SOURCE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  "دارك ويب": "#DC3545",
  "تليجرام": "#6459A7",
  "مواقع اللصق": "#D4AF37",
};

function formatNumber(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return (n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1) + "M";
  if (n >= 1_000) return (n / 1_000).toFixed(0) + "K";
  return n.toLocaleString("ar-SA");
}

export default function PatternCompare({ patterns, onClose }: PatternCompareProps) {
  const tc = useThemeColors();
  const [patternA, setPatternA] = useState<PatternItem | null>(null);
  const [patternB, setPatternB] = useState<PatternItem | null>(null);
  const [selectingFor, setSelectingFor] = useState<"A" | "B" | null>("A");

  const handleSelect = (pattern: PatternItem) => {
    if (selectingFor === "A") {
      setPatternA(pattern);
      if (!patternB) setSelectingFor("B");
      else setSelectingFor(null);
    } else if (selectingFor === "B") {
      setPatternB(pattern);
      setSelectingFor(null);
    }
  };

  // Radar comparison data
  const radarData = useMemo(() => {
    if (!patternA || !patternB) return [];
    const maxIncidents = Math.max(patternA.count, patternB.count);
    const maxRecords = Math.max(patternA.records, patternB.records);
    const maxSectors = Math.max(patternA.sectorCount, patternB.sectorCount);
    const maxPii = Math.max((Array.isArray(patternA.piiTypes) ? patternA.piiTypes.length : 0), (Array.isArray(patternB.piiTypes) ? patternB.piiTypes.length : 0));

    return [
      { metric: "حالات الرصد", A: (patternA.count / maxIncidents) * 100, B: (patternB.count / maxIncidents) * 100 },
      { metric: "السجلات المكشوفة", A: (patternA.records / maxRecords) * 100, B: (patternB.records / maxRecords) * 100 },
      { metric: "القطاعات", A: (patternA.sectorCount / maxSectors) * 100, B: (patternB.sectorCount / maxSectors) * 100 },
      { metric: "أنواع البيانات", A: ((Array.isArray(patternA.piiTypes) ? patternA.piiTypes.length : 0) / maxPii) * 100, B: ((Array.isArray(patternB.piiTypes) ? patternB.piiTypes.length : 0) / maxPii) * 100 },
      { metric: "متوسط الحجم", A: Math.min(((patternA.records / patternA.count) / Math.max(patternA.records / patternA.count, patternB.records / patternB.count)) * 100, 100), B: Math.min(((patternB.records / patternB.count) / Math.max(patternA.records / patternA.count, patternB.records / patternB.count)) * 100, 100) },
    ];
  }, [patternA, patternB]);

  // PII overlap analysis
  const piiAnalysis = useMemo(() => {
    if (!patternA || !patternB) return { shared: [], onlyA: [], onlyB: [] };
    const setA = new Set(Array.isArray(patternA.piiTypes) ? patternA.piiTypes : []);
    const setB = new Set(Array.isArray(patternB.piiTypes) ? patternB.piiTypes : []);
    const piiA = Array.isArray(patternA.piiTypes) ? patternA.piiTypes : [];
    const piiB = Array.isArray(patternB.piiTypes) ? patternB.piiTypes : [];
    const shared = piiA.filter(p => setB.has(p));
    const onlyA = piiA.filter(p => !setB.has(p));
    const onlyB = piiB.filter(p => !setA.has(p));
    return { shared, onlyA, onlyB };
  }, [patternA, patternB]);

  // Sector overlap
  const sectorAnalysis = useMemo(() => {
    if (!patternA || !patternB) return { shared: [], onlyA: [], onlyB: [] };
    const setA = new Set(Array.isArray(patternA.sectors) ? patternA.sectors : []);
    const setB = new Set(Array.isArray(patternB.sectors) ? patternB.sectors : []);
    const secA = Array.isArray(patternA.sectors) ? patternA.sectors : [];
    const secB = Array.isArray(patternB.sectors) ? patternB.sectors : [];
    const shared = secA.filter(s => setB.has(s));
    const onlyA = secA.filter(s => !setB.has(s));
    const onlyB = secB.filter(s => !setA.has(s));
    return { shared, onlyA, onlyB };
  }, [patternA, patternB]);

  // Comparison metrics
  const metrics = useMemo(() => {
    if (!patternA || !patternB) return [];
    const avgA = patternA.count > 0 ? Math.round(patternA.records / patternA.count) : 0;
    const avgB = patternB.count > 0 ? Math.round(patternB.records / patternB.count) : 0;
    return [
      { label: "عدد حالات الرصد", a: patternA.count, b: patternB.count, format: "num" },
      { label: "السجلات المكشوفة", a: patternA.records, b: patternB.records, format: "big" },
      { label: "القطاعات المتأثرة", a: patternA.sectorCount, b: patternB.sectorCount, format: "num" },
      { label: "أنواع البيانات", a: (Array.isArray(patternA.piiTypes) ? patternA.piiTypes.length : 0), b: (Array.isArray(patternB.piiTypes) ? patternB.piiTypes.length : 0), format: "num" },
      { label: "متوسط حجم حالة الرصد", a: avgA, b: avgB, format: "big" },
    ];
  }, [patternA, patternB]);

  const renderDiff = (a: number, b: number) => {
    if (a > b) return <ArrowUpRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-[#DC3545]" />;
    if (a < b) return <ArrowDownRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary" />;
    return <Minus className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-500" />;
  };

  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
      className="fixed inset-0 z-[70] overflow-y-auto"
      style={{ background: tc.isDark ? "rgba(8,12,38,0.97)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.99)", ...(tc.isDark ? { backdropFilter: "blur(20px)" } : {}) }}
    >
      <div className="container max-w-7xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: "rgba(100,89,167,0.15)", border: "1px solid rgba(100,89,167,0.3)" }}>
              <GitCompareArrows className="w-6 h-6 text-[#6459A7]" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">مقارنة الأنماط</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">تحليل جنب-إلى-جنب بين نمطين مختلفين</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors" style={{ border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }}>
            <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Pattern Selection */}
        {(!patternA || !patternB || selectingFor) && (
          <div className="mb-8">
            {/* Selected patterns preview */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
              {/* Pattern A slot */}
              <div
                className={`p-5 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed transition-all ${
                  selectingFor === "A" ? "border-[hsl(var(--primary))]" : patternA ? "border-primary/30" : "border-white/10"
                }`}
                style={{ background: patternA ? "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.05)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" }}
              >
                {patternA ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                        <div className="w-3 h-3 rounded-full" style={{ background: SOURCE_COLORS[patternA.source] || "#6459A7" }} />
                        <span className="text-white font-semibold">{patternA.source}</span>
                        <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: `${SEVERITY_COLORS[patternA.severity]}20`, color: SEVERITY_COLORS[patternA.severity] }}>
                          {patternA.severity}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{patternA.count} حالة رصد · {formatNumber(patternA.records)} سجل</div>
                    </div>
                    <button onClick={() => { setPatternA(null); setSelectingFor("A"); }} className="text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-white transition-colors px-2 py-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5">
                      تغيير
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="text-center py-4">
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">النمط الأول (A)</div>
                    <button onClick={() => setSelectingFor("A")} className="text-xs text-primary hover:underline">
                      اختر نمطاً
                    </button>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              {/* Pattern B slot */}
              <div
                className={`p-5 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed transition-all ${
                  selectingFor === "B" ? "border-[#D4AF37]" : patternB ? "border-[#D4AF37]/30" : "border-white/10"
                }`}
                style={{ background: patternB ? "rgba(212,175,55,0.05)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" }}
              >
                {patternB ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                        <div className="w-3 h-3 rounded-full" style={{ background: SOURCE_COLORS[patternB.source] || "#6459A7" }} />
                        <span className="text-white font-semibold">{patternB.source}</span>
                        <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: `${SEVERITY_COLORS[patternB.severity]}20`, color: SEVERITY_COLORS[patternB.severity] }}>
                          {patternB.severity}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{patternB.count} حالة رصد · {formatNumber(patternB.records)} سجل</div>
                    </div>
                    <button onClick={() => { setPatternB(null); setSelectingFor("B"); }} className="text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-white transition-colors px-2 py-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5">
                      تغيير
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="text-center py-4">
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">النمط الثاني (B)</div>
                    <button onClick={() => setSelectingFor("B")} className="text-xs text-[#D4AF37] hover:underline">
                      اختر نمطاً
                    </button>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Pattern selection grid */}
            {selectingFor && (
              <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
                <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-3">
                  اختر النمط {selectingFor === "A" ? "الأول" : "الثاني"}:
                </h4>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                  {patterns.map((p) => {
                    const isDisabled = (selectingFor === "A" && patternB?.id === p.id) || (selectingFor === "B" && patternA?.id === p.id);
                    const sevColor = SEVERITY_COLORS[p.severity] || "hsl(var(--primary))";
                    const srcColor = SOURCE_COLORS[p.source] || "#6459A7";
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={p.id}
                        onClick={() => !isDisabled && handleSelect(p)}
                        disabled={isDisabled}
                        className={`p-4 rounded-xl text-right transition-all ${isDisabled ? "opacity-30 cursor-not-allowed" : "hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer"}`}
                        style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                          <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: srcColor }} />
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-300">{p.source}</span>
                          <span className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full mr-auto" style={{ background: `${sevColor}20`, color: sevColor }}>
                            {p.severity}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
                          <span className="mono-num">{p.count} حالة رصد</span>
                          <span className="mono-num">{formatNumber(p.records)} سجل</span>
                        </div>
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </motion.div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Comparison Results */}
        {patternA && patternB && !selectingFor && (
          <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="space-y-6">
            {/* Metrics Table */}
            <div className="glass-card p-6">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Database className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
                المقارنة الرقمية
              </h3>
              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                <table className="w-full text-sm">
                  <thead>
                    <tr className="border-b border-white/5">
                      <th className="text-right py-3 px-4 text-gray-400 font-medium">المؤشر</th>
                      <th className="text-center py-3 px-4 font-medium" style={{ color: "hsl(var(--primary))" }}>
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                          <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: SOURCE_COLORS[patternA.source] }} />
                          {patternA.source} — {patternA.severity}
                        </div>
                      </th>
                      <th className="text-center py-3 px-4 text-gray-500 font-medium w-16">الفرق</th>
                      <th className="text-center py-3 px-4 font-medium" style={{ color: "#D4AF37" }}>
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                          <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: SOURCE_COLORS[patternB.source] }} />
                          {patternB.source} — {patternB.severity}
                        </div>
                      </th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {metrics.map((m, i) => (
                      <tr key={i} className="border-b border-white/3 hover:bg-white/2 transition-colors">
                        <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300 font-medium">{m.label}</td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-4 text-center">
                          <span className={`mono-num font-bold ${m.a >= m.b ? "text-primary" : "text-gray-400"}`}>
                            {m.format === "big" ? formatNumber(m.a) : m.a.toLocaleString("ar-SA")}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-4 text-center">{renderDiff(m.a, m.b)}</td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-4 text-center">
                          <span className={`mono-num font-bold ${m.b >= m.a ? "text-[#D4AF37]" : "text-gray-400"}`}>
                            {m.format === "big" ? formatNumber(m.b) : m.b.toLocaleString("ar-SA")}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Radar Chart */}
            <div className="glass-card p-6">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Layers className="w-5 h-5 text-[#6459A7]" />
                مقارنة الأبعاد
              </h3>
              <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={350}>
                <RadarChart data={radarData}>
                  <PolarGrid stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" />
                  <PolarAngleAxis dataKey="metric" tick={{ fill: "#aaa", fontSize: 12, fontFamily: "Tajawal" }} />
                  <PolarRadiusAxis tick={false} axisLine={false} domain={[0, 100]} />
                  <Radar name={`${patternA.source} — ${patternA.severity}`} dataKey="A" stroke="hsl(var(--primary))" fill="hsl(var(--primary))" fillOpacity={0.2} strokeWidth={2} />
                  <Radar name={`${patternB.source} — ${patternB.severity}`} dataKey="B" stroke="#D4AF37" fill="#D4AF37" fillOpacity={0.2} strokeWidth={2} />
                  <Legend wrapperStyle={{ fontFamily: "Tajawal", fontSize: 12 }} formatter={(value) => <span style={{ color: "#ccc" }}>{value}</span>} />
                </RadarChart>
              </ResponsiveContainer>
            </div>

            {/* PII Types Overlap */}
            <div className="glass-card p-6">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-[#D4AF37]" />
                تحليل أنواع البيانات المشتركة
              </h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="p-4 rounded-xl text-center" style={{ background: "rgba(100,89,167,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(100,89,167,0.15)" }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold text-[#6459A7]">{piiAnalysis.shared.length}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">مشترك</div>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 rounded-xl text-center" style={{ background: "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.08)", border: "1px solid hsl(var(--primary) / 0.15)" }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold text-primary">{piiAnalysis.onlyA.length}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">فقط في A</div>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 rounded-xl text-center" style={{ background: "rgba(212,175,55,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.15)" }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold text-[#D4AF37]">{piiAnalysis.onlyB.length}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">فقط في B</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Shared PII */}
              {piiAnalysis.shared.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mb-3">
                  <h5 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400 mb-2">بيانات مشتركة:</h5>
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                    {piiAnalysis.shared.map((p, i) => (
                      <span key={i} className="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1" style={{ background: "rgba(100,89,167,0.15)", color: "#9B8FD8", border: "1px solid rgba(100,89,167,0.25)" }}>
                        <Check className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />
                        {p}
                      </span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Only A */}
              {piiAnalysis.onlyA.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mb-3">
                  <h5 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400 mb-2">فقط في النمط A:</h5>
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                    {piiAnalysis.onlyA.map((p, i) => (
                      <span key={i} className="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full" style={{ background: "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.1)", color: "hsl(var(--primary))", border: "1px solid hsl(var(--primary) / 0.2)" }}>
                        {p}
                      </span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Only B */}
              {piiAnalysis.onlyB.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h5 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400 mb-2">فقط في النمط B:</h5>
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                    {piiAnalysis.onlyB.map((p, i) => (
                      <span key={i} className="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full" style={{ background: "rgba(212,175,55,0.1)", color: "#F0D060", border: "1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2)" }}>
                        {p}
                      </span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Sector Overlap */}
            <div className="glass-card p-6">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
                تحليل القطاعات المشتركة
              </h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="p-4 rounded-xl text-center" style={{ background: "rgba(100,89,167,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(100,89,167,0.15)" }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold text-[#6459A7]">{sectorAnalysis.shared.length}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">قطاع مشترك</div>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 rounded-xl text-center" style={{ background: "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.08)", border: "1px solid hsl(var(--primary) / 0.15)" }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold text-primary">{sectorAnalysis.onlyA.length}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">فقط في A</div>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 rounded-xl text-center" style={{ background: "rgba(212,175,55,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.15)" }}>
                  <div className="mono-num text-2xl font-bold text-[#D4AF37]">{sectorAnalysis.onlyB.length}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">فقط في B</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                {sectorAnalysis.shared.map((s, i) => (
                  <span key={i} className="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1" style={{ background: "rgba(100,89,167,0.12)", color: "#9B8FD8", border: "1px solid rgba(100,89,167,0.2)" }}>
                    <Check className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />
                    {s}
                  </span>
                ))}
                {sectorAnalysis.onlyA.map((s, i) => (
                  <span key={`a${i}`} className="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full" style={{ background: "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.08)", color: "hsl(var(--primary))", border: "1px solid hsl(var(--primary) / 0.15)" }}>
                    {s}
                  </span>
                ))}
                {sectorAnalysis.onlyB.map((s, i) => (
                  <span key={`b${i}`} className="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full" style={{ background: "rgba(212,175,55,0.08)", color: "#F0D060", border: "1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.15)" }}>
                    {s}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Reset button */}
            <div className="text-center pt-4">
              <button
                onClick={() => { setPatternA(null); setPatternB(null); setSelectingFor("A"); }}
                className="px-6 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-all"
                style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }}
              >
                إعادة المقارنة
              </button>
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </div>
    </motion.div>
  );
}
```

## `client/src/components/atlas/PdfExport.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * PDF Export for Incident Detail Cards
 * Uses jsPDF to generate Arabic-compatible PDF reports
 * Design: Sovereign Atlas — Navy/Teal/Gold
 */

import { useState } from "react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { FileDown, Loader2, Check } from "lucide-react";

interface IncidentForPdf {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  titleEn: string;
  records: number;
  date: string;
  sector: string;
  sectorEn: string;
  source: string;
  severity: string;
  region: string;
  city: string;
  description: string;
  piiTypes: string[];
  status: string;
  threatActor: string;
  breachMethod: string;
  sourcePlatform: string;
}

interface PdfExportButtonProps {
  incident: IncidentForPdf;
  patternSource?: string;
  patternSeverity?: string;
}

function formatNumber(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return (n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1) + "M";
  if (n >= 1_000) return (n / 1_000).toFixed(0) + "K";
  return n.toLocaleString();
}

export default function PdfExportButton({ incident, patternSource, patternSeverity }: PdfExportButtonProps) {
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false);
  const [done, setDone] = useState(false);

  const exportPdf = async () => {
    setExporting(true);
    try {
      const { jsPDF } = await import("jspdf");
      const doc = new jsPDF({
        orientation: "portrait",
        unit: "mm",
        format: "a4",
      });

      const pageWidth = 210;
      const margin = 20;
      const contentWidth = pageWidth - margin * 2;
      let y = margin;

      // Background
      doc.setFillColor(10, 15, 44);
      doc.rect(0, 0, 210, 297, "F");

      // Header bar
      doc.setFillColor(20, 27, 61);
      doc.rect(0, 0, 210, 45, "F");
      doc.setDrawColor(61, 177, 172);
      doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
      doc.line(margin, 44, pageWidth - margin, 44);

      // Title - use built-in font for English content
      doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
      doc.setFontSize(10);
      doc.setTextColor(61, 177, 172);
      doc.text("RASID Platform — Incident Report", pageWidth - margin, 15, { align: "right" });

      doc.setFontSize(8);
      doc.setTextColor(150, 150, 170);
      doc.text("National PII Atlas & Pattern Lab", pageWidth - margin, 22, { align: "right" });

      // Incident ID
      doc.setFontSize(12);
      doc.setTextColor(212, 175, 55);
      doc.text(incident.id, margin, 15);

      // Severity badge
      const sevColors: Record<string, [number, number, number]> = {
        "واسع النطاق": [220, 53, 69],
        "مرتفع": [255, 140, 66],
        "متوسط": [212, 175, 55],
        "محدود": [61, 177, 172],
      };
      const sevColor = sevColors[incident.severity] || [61, 177, 172];
      doc.setFillColor(sevColor[0], sevColor[1], sevColor[2]);
      doc.roundedRect(margin, 26, 35, 8, 2, 2, "F");
      doc.setFontSize(7);
      doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
      doc.text(incident.severity, margin + 17.5, 31.5, { align: "center" });

      // Source badge
      const srcColors: Record<string, [number, number, number]> = {
        "دارك ويب": [220, 53, 69],
        "تليجرام": [100, 89, 167],
        "مواقع اللصق": [212, 175, 55],
      };
      const srcColor = srcColors[incident.source] || [100, 89, 167];
      doc.setFillColor(srcColor[0], srcColor[1], srcColor[2]);
      doc.roundedRect(margin + 38, 26, 30, 8, 2, 2, "F");
      doc.setFontSize(7);
      doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
      doc.text(incident.source, margin + 53, 31.5, { align: "center" });

      y = 55;

      // Title (English)
      doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
      doc.setFontSize(14);
      doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
      const titleLines = doc.splitTextToSize(incident.titleEn || incident.title, contentWidth);
      doc.text(titleLines, margin, y);
      y += titleLines.length * 7 + 5;

      // Arabic title
      if (incident.title !== incident.titleEn) {
        doc.setFont("helvetica", "normal");
        doc.setFontSize(10);
        doc.setTextColor(180, 180, 200);
        const arLines = doc.splitTextToSize(incident.title, contentWidth);
        doc.text(arLines, pageWidth - margin, y, { align: "right" });
        y += arLines.length * 5 + 5;
      }

      // Records count - big display
      y += 5;
      doc.setFillColor(20, 27, 61);
      doc.roundedRect(margin, y, contentWidth, 25, 3, 3, "F");
      doc.setDrawColor(61, 177, 172);
      doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
      doc.roundedRect(margin, y, contentWidth, 25, 3, 3, "S");

      doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
      doc.setFontSize(18);
      doc.setTextColor(sevColor[0], sevColor[1], sevColor[2]);
      doc.text(formatNumber(incident.records), pageWidth / 2, y + 11, { align: "center" });
      doc.setFontSize(8);
      doc.setTextColor(150, 150, 170);
      doc.text("Exposed Records", pageWidth / 2, y + 19, { align: "center" });
      y += 35;

      // Info grid
      const infoItems = [
        { label: "Date", value: incident.date || "N/A" },
        { label: "Source", value: incident.source },
        { label: "Severity", value: incident.severity },
        { label: "Region", value: incident.region || "N/A" },
        { label: "City", value: incident.city || "N/A" },
        { label: "Sector", value: incident.sectorEn || incident.sector },
        { label: "Status", value: incident.status === "documented" ? "Documented" : incident.status === "verified" ? "Verified" : incident.status },
        { label: "Threat Actor", value: incident.threatActor || "Unknown" },
        { label: "Breach Method", value: incident.breachMethod || "N/A" },
        { label: "Platform", value: incident.sourcePlatform || "N/A" },
      ];

      // Section header
      doc.setFillColor(61, 177, 172);
      doc.rect(margin, y, 3, 6, "F");
      doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
      doc.setFontSize(11);
      doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
      doc.text("Incident Details", margin + 6, y + 5);
      y += 12;

      const colWidth = contentWidth / 2;
      infoItems.forEach((item, i) => {
        const col = i % 2;
        const x = margin + col * colWidth;
        if (col === 0 && i > 0) y += 12;

        doc.setFillColor(15, 20, 50);
        doc.roundedRect(x, y, colWidth - 3, 10, 1.5, 1.5, "F");

        doc.setFont("helvetica", "normal");
        doc.setFontSize(7);
        doc.setTextColor(120, 120, 150);
        doc.text(item.label, x + 3, y + 4);

        doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
        doc.setFontSize(8);
        doc.setTextColor(220, 220, 240);
        const valText = doc.splitTextToSize(item.value, colWidth - 8);
        doc.text(valText[0] || "", x + 3, y + 8.5);
      });
      y += 20;

      // Description
      if (incident.description) {
        doc.setFillColor(61, 177, 172);
        doc.rect(margin, y, 3, 6, "F");
        doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
        doc.setFontSize(11);
        doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
        doc.text("Description", margin + 6, y + 5);
        y += 12;

        doc.setFillColor(15, 20, 50);
        const descLines = doc.splitTextToSize(incident.description, contentWidth - 10);
        const descHeight = Math.min(descLines.length * 4.5 + 8, 50);
        doc.roundedRect(margin, y, contentWidth, descHeight, 2, 2, "F");

        doc.setFont("helvetica", "normal");
        doc.setFontSize(8);
        doc.setTextColor(180, 180, 200);
        doc.text(descLines.slice(0, 8), margin + 5, y + 6);
        y += descHeight + 8;
      }

      // PII Types
      if (incident.piiTypes && incident.piiTypes.length > 0) {
        // Check if we need a new page
        if (y > 240) {
          doc.addPage();
          doc.setFillColor(10, 15, 44);
          doc.rect(0, 0, 210, 297, "F");
          y = margin;
        }

        doc.setFillColor(212, 175, 55);
        doc.rect(margin, y, 3, 6, "F");
        doc.setFont("helvetica", "bold");
        doc.setFontSize(11);
        doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
        doc.text(`Alleged PII Types (${incident.piiTypes.length})`, margin + 6, y + 5);
        y += 12;

        let tagX = margin;
        const tagHeight = 7;
        incident.piiTypes.forEach((pii) => {
          const tagWidth = Math.max(doc.getTextWidth(pii) * 0.8 + 8, 20);
          if (tagX + tagWidth > pageWidth - margin) {
            tagX = margin;
            y += tagHeight + 3;
          }
          doc.setFillColor(30, 25, 55);
          doc.roundedRect(tagX, y, tagWidth, tagHeight, 2, 2, "F");
          doc.setDrawColor(212, 175, 55);
          doc.setLineWidth(0.2);
          doc.roundedRect(tagX, y, tagWidth, tagHeight, 2, 2, "S");
          doc.setFont("helvetica", "normal");
          doc.setFontSize(7);
          doc.setTextColor(240, 208, 96);
          doc.text(pii, tagX + tagWidth / 2, y + 4.8, { align: "center" });
          tagX += tagWidth + 3;
        });
        y += tagHeight + 10;
      }

      // Footer
      const footerY = 285;
      doc.setDrawColor(61, 177, 172);
      doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
      doc.line(margin, footerY - 5, pageWidth - margin, footerY - 5);
      doc.setFont("helvetica", "normal");
      doc.setFontSize(7);
      doc.setTextColor(100, 100, 130);
      doc.text("RASID Platform — National PII Atlas", margin, footerY);
      doc.text(`Generated: ${new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]}`, pageWidth - margin, footerY, { align: "right" });
      doc.text("CONFIDENTIAL", pageWidth / 2, footerY, { align: "center" });

      // Save
      doc.save(`RASID_Incident_${incident.id}.pdf`);
      setDone(true);
      setTimeout(() => setDone(false), 2000);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("PDF export failed:", err);
    } finally {
      setExporting(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <motion.button
      onClick={exportPdf}
      disabled={exporting}
      whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }}
      whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
      style={{
        background: done ? "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.2)" : "rgba(212,175,55,0.12)",
        border: `1px solid ${done ? "hsl(var(--primary) / 0.3)" : "rgba(212,175,55,0.25)"}`,
        color: done ? "hsl(var(--primary))" : "#F0D060",
      }}
    >
      {exporting ? (
        <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
      ) : done ? (
        <Check className="w-4 h-4" />
      ) : (
        <FileDown className="w-4 h-4" />
      )}
      {exporting ? "جارٍ التصدير..." : done ? "تم التصدير" : "تصدير PDF"}
    </motion.button>
  );
}
```
